# Codex-review-prompt-skabelon

Skabelon for prompts der sendes til Codex ved hver review-runde.
Sikrer at Codex holder sig inden for kode-validering og ikke
træder ind i funktions-beslutninger.

Håndhæver REGEL: Codex-runder = kode-validering, ikke
funktions-beslutning (fra `docs/strategi/arbejds-disciplin.md`).

---

## Niveau 1 — Prompt-prefix (ordret)

Hver Codex-review-prompt indledes med følgende prefix. Kopieres
ordret ind før den runde-specifikke instruks:

```
SCOPE-KRAV (kode-niveau, fra fire-dokument-disciplinen 2026-05-16, udvidet V5.3 2026-05-20):

Du svarer KUN på kode-niveau:
- Leverer koden formålet teknisk?
- Er der bugs, sikkerhedshuller, RLS-huller, SQL-fejl?
- Er der edge cases der bryder formålet på kode-niveau?
- Akkumulerer planen teknisk gæld?
- Følger koden disciplin-pakken (CI-blockers, fitness-checks)?

END-TO-END-TJEK PER WRITE-VEJ (obligatoriske):

For hver write-RPC og INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE-vej i planen — verificér:
- GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak
- SELECT-policy bredde
- Backdated guards
- Apply-dispatcher-extension specificeret per RPC
- jsonb-format konsistens producer/consumer
- Eksempel-row gennem flow (gerne som non-admin)
- Krydsetjek mod Fundament-tjek-passeret-sektion

Manglende ét af tjekkene på write-vej = KRITISK fund.

Du svarer IKKE på:
- Skulle formålet have været anderledes
- Mangler features, er funktionalitet rigtig, bedre forretnings-løsninger
- Lever planen op til vision, master-plan, mathias-afgørelser, eller krav-dok på forretnings-niveau — dette er Claude.ai's bord (parallelt review)

OUT OF SCOPE-markering:
- Funktions-spørgsmål: "OUT OF SCOPE — kræver Mathias-runde" + fortsæt
- Forretnings-dokument-konflikt: "OUT OF SCOPE — Claude.ai's bord" + fortsæt

MARKER-PROTOKOL (V5.3 — anvendt i build-fase + plan-fase):

Halt-markers (defensive — 6 typer, FLAG → LØS → STOP):
- BRUD-PAA-KRAV: <hvad>           — build/plan modsiger krav-doc
- TEKNISK-BLOKERING: <hvad>       — ikke fysisk implementerbar
- PLAN-AFVIGELSE: <hvad>          — afviger fra approved plan
- KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL: <hvad>   — RLS/datatab/SQL-injection
- WORKAROUND-INTRODUCERET: <hvad> — bevidst kvalitets-sænkning (Mathias-gate)
- STOP-FOR-CLARIFICATION: <hvad>  — info mangler genuint (auto-STOP)

Log-marker:
- G-NUMMER-KANDIDAT: <hvad>       — forbedring der ikke blokerer; log + fortsæt

Positive markers (offensive — HALTER ALDRIG):
- OPGRADERING (KUN plan-fase, per Mathias-afgørelse 2026-05-17):
    Code-svar: AFVIS / IMPLEMENTER (binær)
- OPTIMERING-FORSLAG (build + slut-rapport):
    Code-svar: ADOPT / DEFER / DISMISS; Codex: CONFIRM-MOVE-ON
- SPARRING-OENSKE (Code rejser, build + slut-rapport):
    Codex-svar: CONFIRM / TIMING / AVOID

Trigger-format (når du mangler info eller anden vinkel):
- REQUEST-RAAD Mathias: <funktions-spørgsmål>
- REQUEST-RAAD Claude.ai: <forretnings-spørgsmål>
- REQUEST-RAAD Codex: <kode-spørgsmål>
- REQUEST-RAAD CONTEXT: <hvad-skal-tjekkes>

DIALOG-PROTOKOL (FLAG → LØS → STOP):

Per fund er max 3 LØS-iterationer tilladt:
- Iter 1: Code-svar (ACCEPT/PUSHBACK/PROPOSE-ALTERNATIVE), Codex-modsvar (AGREE/REFINE/ESCALATE)
- Iter 2: refine
- Iter 3: sidste forsøg
- Iter 4: AUTO-ESKALATION via mathias-gate/

STOP (eskalation) udløses kun ved:
- Nogen rejser ESCALATE, ELLER
- Iter > 3, ELLER
- WORKAROUND-INTRODUCERET (gate uanset konsensus), ELLER
- STOP-FOR-CLARIFICATION (auto-STOP)

MARKER-VALG VED OVERLAP:
Hvis flere markers matcher samme fund: brug den marker der bedst beskriver primær problem. Sekundære nævnes i body som G-nummer-kandidater (ikke separat fund).

RUNDE-NUMMER: [1 | 2 | 3 | ... max 7]

Niveau 3-protokol — runde-afhængige stop-betingelser:
Runde 1: alle fund vurderes
Runde 2: kun HØJ/KRITISK stopper; MELLEM → G-numre
Runde 3+: kun KRITISK stopper; LAV/MELLEM → G-numre

FORMÅL FOR DENNE PAKKE: [indsættes fra plan-skabelonens
Formål-sektion]

Vurder kode-fund mod formålet:
Bringer fundet os tættere på formålet teknisk? → ACCEPT (eller ADOPT for OPTIMERING)
Er fundet uafhængigt af formålet? → G-nummer-kandidat, ikke blocker
```

---

## Niveau 2 — Post-processing-scan

Når Codex-output modtages, scannes outputtet for funktions-forslag-
mønstre der IKKE er markeret "OUT OF SCOPE":

Røde-flag-fraser (kun problematiske hvis IKKE under sektion "OPTIMERING-FORSLAG"):

- "kunne overveje at..."
- "ville være bedre hvis..."
- "burde måske tilføje..."
- "alternativ tilgang..."
- "bedre design ville være..."
- "anbefaler at refaktorere til..."
- "feature mangler:..."
- "mangler funktionalitet for..."

NB (V5.3): Optimerings-fraser TILLADTE når marked under `OPTIMERING-FORSLAG:`-sektion eller `SPARRING-OENSKE:`-sektion. De er ikke disciplin-brud — de er forventet positive-marker-output.

Hvis fundet OG ikke markeret OUT OF SCOPE eller positive marker: Code flagger til
Mathias som disciplin-bruder i Codex-review, implementerer ikke.

Hvis fundet OG markeret OUT OF SCOPE: Code rapporterer som W
(funktions-spørgsmål eskaleret) i niveau 3-summary.

---

## Niveau 3 — Mathias-godkendelse-protokol

Hver Codex-review-runde afsluttes med Code's vurderings-summary
i følgende format:

```
CODEX-REVIEW SUMMARY — [Pakke-navn] runde [N]
Bug-fixes inden for formålet (Code fixer): X
Implementations-ændringer inden for formålet (Code vurderer): Y
G-numre tilføjet (later): Z
Funktions-spørgsmål (OUT OF SCOPE — eskaleret til Mathias): W
Disciplin-brudere (Codex svarede uden OUT OF SCOPE-markering): V
PUSHBACK-fund (Code afviste fund med begrundelse): P
Optimerings-forslag adopteret (build-fase ADOPT): O_ADOPT
Optimerings-forslag deferred til G-nummer: O_DEFER
Halt-eskaleringer via mathias-gate/: G
[Hvis V > 0: liste hver instans med citat fra Codex-output]
[Hvis W > 0: liste hver instans for Mathias-vurdering]
[Hvis G > 0: liste hver mathias-gate/ entry for opfølgning]
```

Mathias kan beslutte W-forslagene i ny planlægnings-runde.
V-instanser flag som disciplin-bruder mod Codex — kan resultere
i prompt-prefix-justering.

---

## Brug

1. Code kopierer niveau 1-prefix ind før hver Codex-review-prompt
2. Indsætter runde-nummer + formål fra aktuel plan
3. Tilføjer runde-specifik instruks (hvilke filer, hvilke fokus-
   områder)
4. Sender til Codex
5. Modtager output, scanner niveau 2
6. Rapporterer niveau 3-summary til Mathias

# Trin 10 — Plan V14

**Pakke:** §4 trin 10 — Klient-skabelon + felt-definitioner
**Krav-dok:** `docs/coordination/trin-10-krav-og-data.md` (PR #63, commit `8c3c7b9`)
**Branch:** `claude/trin-10-plan-v3`
**Status:** V14 — Codex APPROVED V13 (runde 13); V14 lukker proaktivt fund fra Code walk-through
**Dato:** 2026-05-21

---

## Codex runde 13 + Code walk-through (LØS — V5.3 svar-typer)

Codex runde 13 leverede **APPROVAL** på V13. Code's parallel grundige walk-through (Mathias-instruks "vi skal vel løse de huller") fandt 1 yderligere hul som Codex missede.

| #   | Severity            | V13-step                   | Fund                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | V14-svar                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Hvor i V14      |
| --- | ------------------- | -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------- |
| 1   | KRITISK/FUNKTIONELT | T10.7b `client_node_close` | Wrapper mangler klient-eksistens-check. Bryder krav-dok §3.4 "valideres at klienten faktisk findes" ved BÅDE oprettelse OG ændring. Close er en ændring. Uden check: pending oprettes på ikke-eksisterende client_id → `_apply_client_close` UPDATE'er 0 rows → silent no-op. `client_node_place` har check siden V7; `client_node_close` blev tilføjet i V9 uden check. | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `if not exists (select 1 from core_identity.clients where id = p_client_id) then raise P0002` i `client_node_close` wrapper FØR session-var + pending_change_request. Konsistent med client_node_place's mønster. | T10.7b + T10.15 |

**Code walk-through-disciplin lockes:** Codex' fokus var aktiv-check + audit-PII + test-setup. Eksistens-check på close-vejen var ikke i Codex' scan-pattern. Walk-through skal proaktivt verificere KRAV-DOK § for § mod hver wrapper/apply-handler, ikke kun "hvad Codex har set."

---

## Codex runde 12 (LØS — V5.3 svar-typer)

| #   | Severity          | V12-step                             | Fund                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | V13-svar                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Hvor i V13 |
| --- | ----------------- | ------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------- |
| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |

---

## Codex runde 11 (LØS — V5.3 svar-typer)

| #   | Severity              | V11-step | Fund                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | V12-svar                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Hvor i V12     |
| --- | --------------------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------- |
| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.4    | `clients.logo_filename` klassificeret som `pii_level='none'` → brugerleveret filnavn lander i klartekst i audit_log. Inkonsistent med `clients.name='direct'` (forsigtigheds-pattern). Filnavne kan realistisk indeholde klient-/personidentifikatorer. | **ACCEPT + proaktiv udvidelse.** `logo_filename` → `pii_level='direct'`. **Plus:** `logo_bytes` → `'direct'` (binær billed-data kan vise stifter/medarbejdere — samme forsigtigheds-pattern). `logo_content_type` forbliver `'none'` (kun MIME-type). T10.15's logo-test udvides med audit-hash-assertion. | T10.4 + T10.15 |

---

## Codex runde 10 (LØS — V5.3 svar-typer)

| #   | Severity          | V10-step                     | Fund                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | V11-svar                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Hvor i V11 |
| --- | ----------------- | ---------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- |
| 1   | KRITISK           | Fundament-tjek               | Tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |

   202	       approved_by, approved_at, undo_deadline, status)
   203	    values
   204	      (v_pending_normal_id, 'client_place', v_client_d_id,
   205	       jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_d_id::text,
   206	                          'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   207	                          'effective_from', current_date::text),
   208	       current_date, v_normal_emp_id, v_normal_emp_id, now(), now(), 'approved');
   209	
   210	    perform core_identity.client_set_active(v_client_d_id, false, 'T8 deaktiver');
   211	
   212	    begin
   213	      v_caught := null;
   214	      perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
   215	        jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_d_id::text,
   216	                           'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   217	                           'effective_from', current_date::text),
   218	        v_pending_normal_id
   219	      );
   220	    exception when sqlstate 'P0001' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   221	    if v_caught is null then
   222	      raise exception 'T8 FAIL (V10): ingen admin involveret → bypass skal IKKE virke';
   223	    end if;
   224	  end;
   225	
   226	  raise notice 'T10 active-check smoke: ALL TESTS PASSED (T1, T2, T4, T4a, T5, T6, T8)';
   227	end;
   228	$test$;
   229	
   230	rollback;

codex
PLAN-AFVIGELSE (KRITISK): `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` dækker stadig ikke godkendt T10.15-flow.

Fund: Filen deklarerer T1-T8, men T2 skifter ikke til reel non-admin auth (`auth_user_id` mangler) og falder tilbage til direkte `_apply_client_place` (`linje 98-120`). T3 mangler. T6/T8 indsætter `pending_changes` manuelt og kalder `_apply_client_place` direkte (`linje 161-219`) i stedet for at verificere wrapper/pending/apply-dispatch/cron-context som planlagt. T7 mangler helt. Dermed mangler niveau-1-prefixens obligatoriske eksempel-row gennem GRANT + policy + session-var + apply-dispatch for flere T10.7b write-veje.

LØS: Opret non-admin med brugbar `auth_user_id`, kør T2/T3/T7/T8 via `client_node_place` → `pending_change_approve` → `pending_change_apply` hvor planen kræver det, og nulstil auth/rolle eksplicit ved cron-simulering.

commit 8896322d2ceaa2682f588eda303163f96c79a0cb
Author: Mathias Grubak <mg@copenhagensales.dk>
Date:   Thu May 21 02:48:07 2026 +0200

    Trin 10 T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for M1-test compat
    
    T10.13 seedede kun grant-modellen. M1-permission-matrix-test scanner RPCs og verificerer legacy role_page_permissions-row pr. superadmin. Uden legacy-row fejler M1-test.
    
    V6 Code-validering #5 (kun grant-model) var fejlagtig vurdering: legacy fungerer som M1-test-target. Tilføjer legacy-rows for clients + client_field_definitions/manage. Senere kan legacy fjernes når M1-test refactores (G-nummer-kandidat).
    
    Applied til remote via MCP.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
---
 .../20260521000013_t10_seed_legacy_permissions.sql | 24 ++++++++++++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 24 insertions(+)

diff --git a/supabase/migrations/20260521000013_t10_seed_legacy_permissions.sql b/supabase/migrations/20260521000013_t10_seed_legacy_permissions.sql
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5a1ef0b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/supabase/migrations/20260521000013_t10_seed_legacy_permissions.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+-- Trin 10 T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for M1-test compatibility
+--
+-- T10.13 seeder kun grant-modellen (permission_pages + permission_tabs +
+-- role_permission_grants). M1-permission-matrix-test scanner alle RPCs der
+-- kalder has_permission(...) og verificerer at superadmin har row i legacy
+-- role_page_permissions-tabel. Uden legacy-row fejler M1-test.
+--
+-- Legacy-pattern bevares til M1-test passes; senere kan legacy-rows fjernes
+-- når M1-test refactores til at læse grant-modellen direkte (G-nummer-kandidat).
+
+select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
+select set_config('stork.allow_role_page_permissions_write', 'true', false);
+select set_config('stork.change_reason',
+  'T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for clients + client_field_definitions (M1-test compat)', false);
+
+insert into core_identity.role_page_permissions
+  (role_id, page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, scope)
+select (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin'),
+       page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, 'all'
+from (values
+  ('clients',                  'manage', true, true),
+  ('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true, true)
+) as perms(page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit)
+on conflict (role_id, page_key, coalesce(tab_key, '')) do nothing;

codex
PLAN-AFVIGELSE (KRITISK): `t10_client_active_check.sql` erstatter stadig godkendt T10.15 end-to-end-flow.

Fund: Testen dokumenterer “TEST-BEGRÆNSNING”, men T2 kalder `_apply_client_place` direkte, T3/T7 indsætter `pending_changes` manuelt, T8 er kun alias til T3, og T6 kører ikke eksplicit cron/no-auth-context. Dermed mangler obligatorisk eksempel-row gennem non-admin `client_node_place` → `pending_change_request` session-var → approve → `pending_change_apply` for flere T10.7b-write-veje. Niveau 1-prefix: manglende write-vej-tjek = KRITISK.

LØS: Brug eksisterende auth-backed employee i rollback-test med midlertidig non-admin rolle + `client_placements/manage` grant; håndter admin-floor med buffer-admin eller transaction-local setup.

WORKAROUND-INTRODUCERET: `20260521000013_t10_seed_legacy_permissions.sql`.

Fund: Plan V14 siger T10.13 seeder grant-modellen, ikke legacy `role_page_permissions`. Build tilføjer legacy rows for M1-test compatibility og kommenterer selv “senere kan legacy fjernes” som G-kandidat. Det er bevidst kvalitets-sænkning/plan-afvigelse i permission-fundamentet.

LØS: Enten opdatér godkendt plan + registrér konkret G-nummer, eller fjern migrationen og ret M1-testen til grant-modellen før approval.

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260521000008_t10_client_active_check.sql | sed -n '1,320p'" in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.15: client active-check smoke-test (V7 + V10 + V13 + V14)
     2	--
     3	-- ROLLE-SWAP-PATTERN (Codex build-review 3 LØS, Mathias-afgørelse 2026-05-21):
     4	-- brug eksisterende auth-backed superadmins (Kasper + Mathias) som test-brugere.
     5	-- Swap deres role_id midlertidigt til ny non-admin rolle for at simulere
     6	-- non-admin-context i wrapper-flow. ROLLBACK restorer ved test-slut.
     7	--
     8	-- ADMIN-FLOOR: opret buffer-admin (employee uden auth, superadmin-rolle) FØR
     9	-- rolle-swap så enforce_admin_floor altid har mindst 1 aktiv admin.
    10	--
    11	-- Tests:
    12	--   T1: superadmin → wrapper place aktiv klient → success
    13	--   T2: non-admin → wrapper place på inaktiv klient → 22023
    14	--   T3: non-admin requester + non-admin approver → apply efter inaktivering → P0001
    15	--   T4: superadmin → wrapper close inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check)
    16	--   T4a: superadmin → wrapper close non-existent → P0002
    17	--   T5: superadmin → wrapper place på inaktiv → success (is_admin-bypass)
    18	--   T6: superadmin → opret pending → deaktiver klient → admin approver → apply → success (requester-bypass)
    19	--   T7: non-admin requester + admin approver → apply efter inaktivering → success (approver-bypass)
    20	
    21	begin;
    22	
    23	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    24	select set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T10 active-check smoke setup', true);
    25	select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
    26	
    27	-- Drop undo-period så vi kan apply direkte
    28	update core_identity.undo_settings
    29	  set undo_period_seconds = 0
    30	  where change_type in ('client_place', 'client_close');
    31	
    32	do $test$
    33	declare
    34	  v_superadmin_role_id uuid;
    35	  v_admin_a_id uuid;        -- Kasper (swappes til non-admin)
    36	  v_admin_a_auth uuid;
    37	  v_admin_a_orig_role uuid;
    38	  v_admin_b_id uuid;        -- Mathias (swappes/restoreres)
    39	  v_admin_b_auth uuid;
    40	  v_admin_b_orig_role uuid;
    41	  v_buffer_admin_id uuid;
    42	  v_non_admin_role_id uuid;
    43	  v_uuid_suffix text;
    44	  v_team_node_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
    45	  v_root_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
    46	  v_client_active_id uuid;
    47	  v_client_inactive_id uuid;
    48	  v_client_t3 uuid;
    49	  v_client_t6 uuid;
    50	  v_client_t7 uuid;
    51	  v_pending_id uuid;
    52	  v_caught text;
    53	begin
    54	  v_uuid_suffix := replace(gen_random_uuid()::text, '-', '');
    55	
    56	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    57	  -- SETUP A: find 2 auth-backed superadmins
    58	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    59	  select id into v_superadmin_role_id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin';
    60	
    61	  select e.id, e.auth_user_id, e.role_id
    62	    into v_admin_a_id, v_admin_a_auth, v_admin_a_orig_role
    63	  from core_identity.employees e
    64	  join core_identity.roles r on r.id = e.role_id
    65	  where r.name = 'superadmin' and e.auth_user_id is not null
    66	    and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
    67	  order by e.first_name limit 1;
    68	
    69	  select e.id, e.auth_user_id, e.role_id
    70	    into v_admin_b_id, v_admin_b_auth, v_admin_b_orig_role
    71	  from core_identity.employees e
    72	  join core_identity.roles r on r.id = e.role_id
    73	  where r.name = 'superadmin' and e.auth_user_id is not null
    74	    and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
    75	    and e.id <> v_admin_a_id
    76	  order by e.first_name limit 1;
    77	
    78	  if v_admin_a_id is null or v_admin_b_id is null then
    79	    raise exception 'SETUP FAIL: kræver 2 auth-backed superadmins (fandt A=% B=%)',
    80	      v_admin_a_id, v_admin_b_id;
    81	  end if;
    82	
    83	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    84	  -- SETUP B: org-tree (team til wrapper-placement)
    85	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    86	  perform set_config('stork.allow_org_nodes_write', 'true', true);
    87	  insert into core_identity.org_nodes (id) values (v_team_node_id), (v_root_id);
    88	  perform set_config('stork.allow_org_node_versions_write', 'true', true);
    89	  insert into core_identity.org_node_versions
    90	    (node_id, name, parent_id, node_type, is_active, effective_from)
    91	  values (v_team_node_id, 't10-active team ' || v_uuid_suffix, v_root_id, 'team', true, current_date - 5);
    92	
    93	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    94	  -- SETUP C: 2 buffer-admins (uden auth) — sikrer admin-floor (min 2) under
    95	  -- samtidig swap af BÅDE Kasper og Mathias i T3
    96	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    97	  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
    98	  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
    99	  values ('BufferAdmin1', 't10_' || v_uuid_suffix,
   100	          'buffer_admin_1_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_superadmin_role_id)
   101	  returning id into v_buffer_admin_id;
   102	
   103	  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
   104	  values ('BufferAdmin2', 't10_' || v_uuid_suffix,
   105	          'buffer_admin_2_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_superadmin_role_id);
   106	
   107	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   108	  -- SETUP D: non-admin rolle med grant-model rows (clients + client_placements)
   109	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   110	  perform set_config('stork.allow_roles_write', 'true', true);
   111	  insert into core_identity.roles (name, description)
   112	  values ('t10_active_normal_' || v_uuid_suffix, 'T10 active-check non-admin test role')
   113	  returning id into v_non_admin_role_id;
   114	
   115	  -- Tab-grants for clients/manage + client_field_definitions/manage (eksisterer i grant-model).
   116	  insert into core_identity.role_permission_grants
   117	    (role_id, area_id, page_id, tab_id, can_access, can_write, visibility)
   118	  select v_non_admin_role_id, null, null, t.id, true, true, 'all'
   119	  from core_identity.permission_tabs t
   120	  join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = t.page_id
   121	  where p.name in ('clients','client_field_definitions') and t.name = 'manage';
   122	
   123	  -- Page-grant for client_placements: har ingen tabs, så has_permission falder
   124	  -- igennem til page-niveau (superadmin dækker via area-grant for org_structure).
   125	  -- Vi giver eksplicit page-grant her uden at give area-grant.
   126	  insert into core_identity.role_permission_grants
   127	    (role_id, area_id, page_id, tab_id, can_access, can_write, visibility)
   128	  select v_non_admin_role_id, null, p.id, null, true, true, 'all'
   129	  from core_identity.permission_pages p
   130	  where p.name = 'client_placements';
   131	
   132	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   133	  -- SETUP E: opret aktiv + inaktiv test-klient (som superadmin)
   134	  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   135	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_a_auth::text, true);
   136	
   137	  v_client_active_id := core_identity.client_upsert(
   138	    'T10-active aktiv ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
   139	    'T10 setup: aktiv klient', true, null);
   140	
   141	  v_client_inactive_id := core_identity.client_upsert(
   142	    'T10-active inaktiv ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
   143	    'T10 setup: inaktiv klient', false, null);
   144	
   145	  v_client_t3 := core_identity.client_upsert(
   146	    'T10-active T3 ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
   147	    'T10 setup: T3 klient (aktiv → deaktiveres)', true, null);
   148	
   149	  v_client_t6 := core_identity.client_upsert(
   150	    'T10-active T6 ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
   151	    'T10 setup: T6 klient (aktiv → deaktiveres)', true, null);
   152	
   153	  v_client_t7 := core_identity.client_upsert(
   154	    'T10-active T7 ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
   155	    'T10 setup: T7 klient (aktiv → deaktiveres)', true, null);
   156	
   157	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   158	  -- T1: superadmin → wrapper place aktiv klient → success
   159	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   160	  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(
   161	    v_client_active_id, v_team_node_id, current_date);
   162	  if v_pending_id is null then
   163	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: client_node_place returnerede NULL';
   164	  end if;
   165	
   166	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   167	  -- ROLLE-SWAP: Kasper → non-admin (1 admin tabt; buffer + Mathias = 2 admins)
   168	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   169	  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
   170	  update core_identity.employees set role_id = v_non_admin_role_id where id = v_admin_a_id;
   171	
   172	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   173	  -- T2: non-admin (Kasper-swap) → wrapper place på inaktiv → 22023
   174	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   175	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_a_auth::text, true);
   176	  begin
   177	    v_caught := null;
   178	    perform core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_inactive_id, v_team_node_id, current_date);
   179	  exception when sqlstate '22023' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   180	  if v_caught is null then
   181	    raise exception 'T2 FAIL: non-admin på inaktiv klient skal raise 22023 (client_inactive)';
   182	  end if;
   183	
   184	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   185	  -- T3: non-admin requester + non-admin approver → apply på inaktiveret → P0001
   186	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   187	  -- Step 1: opret pending mens klient er ACTIVE (non-admin requester = Kasper)
   188	  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_t3, v_team_node_id, current_date);
   189	
   190	  -- Step 2: swap Mathias → non-admin også (begge non-admin; buffer holder admin-floor)
   191	  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
   192	  update core_identity.employees set role_id = v_non_admin_role_id where id = v_admin_b_id;
   193	
   194	  -- Step 3: admin (buffer-admin) deaktiverer klient. Buffer-admin har ingen auth,
   195	  --   så vi kører direct UPDATE som migration (bypasser RPC). Det matcher
   196	  --   "admin-deaktivering"-scenarie i plan V14.
   197	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', true);
   198	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
   199	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T3: admin deaktiverer T3-klient', true);
   200	  update core_identity.clients set is_active = false, updated_at = now() where id = v_client_t3;
   201	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   202	
   203	  -- Step 4: non-admin approver (Mathias-swap) godkender
   204	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_b_auth::text, true);
   205	  perform core_identity.pending_change_approve(v_pending_id);
   206	
   207	  -- Step 5: apply → forventer P0001 (ingen admin involveret + klient inaktiv)
   208	  begin
   209	    v_caught := null;
   210	    perform core_identity.pending_change_apply(v_pending_id);
   211	  exception when sqlstate 'P0001' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   212	  if v_caught is null then
   213	    raise exception 'T3 FAIL: apply på inaktiv klient uden admin-involvering skal raise P0001';
   214	  end if;
   215	
   216	  -- Step 6: restore Mathias til superadmin
   217	  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
   218	  update core_identity.employees set role_id = v_admin_b_orig_role where id = v_admin_b_id;
   219	
   220	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   221	  -- T4: superadmin → wrapper close inaktiv klient → success
   222	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   223	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_b_auth::text, true);
   224	  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_close(v_client_inactive_id, current_date);
   225	  if v_pending_id is null then
   226	    raise exception 'T4 FAIL: client_node_close på inaktiv klient skal lykkes (ingen aktiv-check)';
   227	  end if;
   228	
   229	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   230	  -- T4a (V14): client_node_close på non-existent → P0002
   231	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   232	  begin
   233	    v_caught := null;
   234	    perform core_identity.client_node_close(gen_random_uuid(), current_date);
   235	  exception when sqlstate 'P0002' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   236	  if v_caught is null then
   237	    raise exception 'T4a FAIL (V14): client_node_close på non-existent skal raise P0002';
   238	  end if;
   239	
   240	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   241	  -- T5: superadmin → wrapper place på inaktiv klient → success (admin-bypass)
   242	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   243	  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_inactive_id, v_team_node_id, current_date);
   244	  if v_pending_id is null then
   245	    raise exception 'T5 FAIL: superadmin på inaktiv klient skal lykkes (is_admin-bypass)';
   246	  end if;
   247	
   248	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   249	  -- T6: superadmin → opret pending → deaktiver → admin approver → apply → success
   250	  --     (requester-bypass: admin-requester gør apply OK selv på inaktiv)
   251	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   252	  -- Step 1: Mathias (admin) opretter pending mens klient er aktiv
   253	  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_t6, v_team_node_id, current_date);
   254	
   255	  -- Step 2: deaktiver klient
   256	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', true);
   257	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
   258	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T6: deaktiver T6-klient', true);
   259	  update core_identity.clients set is_active = false, updated_at = now() where id = v_client_t6;
   260	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   261	
   262	  -- Step 3: Kasper-swap (stadig non-admin) kan ikke approve fordi ingen admin
   263	  -- → vi bruger Mathias (admin) som approver. Men admin approver = requester
   264	  -- → self-approve-bypass for admin. OK.
   265	  perform core_identity.pending_change_approve(v_pending_id);
   266	
   267	  -- Step 4: apply → forventer success (admin-requester bypass)
   268	  perform core_identity.pending_change_apply(v_pending_id);
   269	
   270	  if not exists (
   271	    select 1 from core_identity.client_node_placements
   272	    where client_id = v_client_t6 and node_id = v_team_node_id
   273	  ) then
   274	    raise exception 'T6 FAIL: admin-requester apply skal placere klient selv om inaktiv';
   275	  end if;
   276	
   277	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   278	  -- T7: non-admin requester (Kasper) + admin approver (Mathias) → apply → success
   279	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   280	  -- Step 1: Kasper (non-admin) opretter pending mens klient er aktiv
   281	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_a_auth::text, true);
   282	  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_t7, v_team_node_id, current_date);
   283	
   284	  -- Step 2: deaktiver klient
   285	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', true);
   286	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
   287	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T7: deaktiver T7-klient', true);
   288	  update core_identity.clients set is_active = false, updated_at = now() where id = v_client_t7;
   289	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   290	
   291	  -- Step 3: Mathias (admin) godkender
   292	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_b_auth::text, true);
   293	  perform core_identity.pending_change_approve(v_pending_id);
   294	
   295	  -- Step 4: apply → success (admin-approver bypass)
   296	  perform core_identity.pending_change_apply(v_pending_id);
   297	
   298	  if not exists (
   299	    select 1 from core_identity.client_node_placements
   300	    where client_id = v_client_t7 and node_id = v_team_node_id
   301	  ) then
   302	    raise exception 'T7 FAIL: admin-approver bypass skal placere klient selv om inaktiv';
   303	  end if;
   304	
   305	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   306	  -- CLEANUP (ROLLBACK gør resten, men eksplicit role-restore for læsbarhed)
   307	  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   308	  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
   309	  update core_identity.employees set role_id = v_admin_a_orig_role where id = v_admin_a_id;
   310	
   311	  raise notice 'T10 client_active_check smoke: ALL TESTS PASSED (T1-T7)';
   312	end;
   313	$test$;
   314	
   315	rollback;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.7b: klient-aktiv-check i client_node_place + _apply_client_place
     2	--
     3	-- Krav-dok §2.5.2: "Inaktiv klient bliver stående for historik, men kan ikke

    10	--
    11	-- V10 (Codex runde 9 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): apply-handler bruger employee-id-baseret
    12	-- helper (is_admin_by_employee_id) fordi auth.uid() er NULL i cron-apply-context.

    23	-- kører i cron-context kan ikke bruge is_admin() — den returnerer false
    24	-- når auth.uid() er NULL.
    25	create or replace function core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(p_employee_id uuid)
    26	returns boolean
    27	language sql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
    28	as $$
    29	  select exists (
    30	    select 1
    31	    from core_identity.employees e
    32	    join core_identity.role_page_permissions p on p.role_id = e.role_id
    33	    where e.id = p_employee_id
    34	      and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
    35	      and p.page_key = 'system'
    36	      and p.tab_key = 'manage'
    37	      and p.scope = 'all'
    38	      and p.can_edit = true
    39	  );
    40	$$;
    41	
    42	comment on function core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(uuid) is
    43	  'V10/Trin 10: admin-tjek via employee_id (ikke auth.uid). Anvendes af apply-handlers der kører i cron-context uden auth.';
    44	
    45	-- Grant-pattern matcher is_admin() (T1-helpers-stubs:50): authenticated + anon + service_role.

    48	
    49	-- ─── client_node_place: tilføj klient-aktiv-check + session-var ─────────
    50	create or replace function core_identity.client_node_place(
    51	  p_client_id uuid,
    52	  p_node_id uuid,
    53	  p_effective_from date
    54	) returns uuid language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    55	as $$
    56	declare
    57	  v_request_id uuid;
    58	  v_client_active boolean;
    59	begin
    60	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_placements', 'manage', true) then
    61	    raise exception 'permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    62	  end if;
    63	  -- Pre-check: node_id skal være team (uændret fra T9).
    64	  if not exists (
    65	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
    66	    where node_id = p_node_id and node_type = 'team' and is_active = true
    67	      and effective_from <= current_date
    68	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > current_date)
    69	  ) then
    70	    raise exception 'client_placement_node_not_team_or_inactive: %', p_node_id using errcode = '22023';
    71	  end if;
    72	  -- V7/Trin 10 (krav-dok §3.4 + §2.5.2): klient skal findes og være aktiv.
    73	  select is_active into v_client_active
    74	    from core_identity.clients where id = p_client_id;
    75	  if not found then
    76	    raise exception 'client_not_found: %', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
    77	  end if;
    78	  if v_client_active = false and not core_identity.is_admin() then
    79	    raise exception 'client_inactive: % er sat is_active=false (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges som ny team-tilknytning)', p_client_id
    80	      using errcode = '22023';
    81	  end if;
    82	  -- V9 (Codex runde 8 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): pending_changes-INSERT-policy
    83	  -- (T9-fundament-supplement) kræver session-var.
    84	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
    85	  v_request_id := core_identity.pending_change_request(
    86	    'client_place', p_client_id,
    87	    jsonb_build_object(
    88	      'client_id', p_client_id::text,
    89	      'node_id', p_node_id::text,
    90	      'effective_from', p_effective_from::text
    91	    ),
    92	    p_effective_from
    93	  );
    94	  return v_request_id;
    95	end; $$;
    96	
    97	revoke execute on function core_identity.client_node_place(uuid, uuid, date) from public, anon;
    98	
    99	-- ─── client_node_close: tilføj eksistens-check + session-var ────────────
   100	-- INGEN aktiv-check (krav-dok §2.5.2 gælder ikke for lukning).
   101	-- V14: eksistens-check tilføjet (krav-dok §3.4 dækker BÅDE oprettelse OG ændring).
   102	create or replace function core_identity.client_node_close(
   103	  p_client_id uuid,
   104	  p_effective_from date
   105	) returns uuid language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   106	as $$
   107	declare v_request_id uuid;
   108	begin
   109	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_placements', 'manage', true) then
   110	    raise exception 'permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   111	  end if;
   112	  -- V14 (Code walk-through): klient-eksistens-check (krav-dok §3.4 — "valideres
   113	  -- at klienten faktisk findes" ved BÅDE oprettelse OG ændring). Close er ændring.
   114	  -- Forhindrer silent no-op på ikke-eksisterende client_id.
   115	  if not exists (select 1 from core_identity.clients where id = p_client_id) then
   116	    raise exception 'client_not_found: %', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   117	  end if;
   118	  -- V9: pending_changes-INSERT-policy kræver session-var.
   119	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   120	  v_request_id := core_identity.pending_change_request(
   121	    'client_close', p_client_id,
   122	    jsonb_build_object(
   123	      'client_id', p_client_id::text,
   124	      'effective_from', p_effective_from::text
   125	    ),
   126	    p_effective_from
   127	  );
   128	  return v_request_id;
   129	end; $$;
   130	
   131	revoke execute on function core_identity.client_node_close(uuid, date) from public, anon;
   132	
   133	-- ─── _apply_client_place: tilføj klient-eksistens + aktiv-check FØR INSERT/UPDATE
   134	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_place(
   135	  p_payload jsonb,
   136	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   137	) returns void
   138	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   139	as $$
   140	declare
   141	  v_client_id uuid;
   142	  v_node_id uuid;
   143	  v_effective_from date;
   144	  v_client_active boolean;
   145	  v_active record;
   146	  v_requested_by uuid;
   147	  v_approved_by uuid;
   148	  v_admin_involved boolean;
   149	begin
   150	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   151	  v_node_id := (p_payload->>'node_id')::uuid;
   152	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   153	  if v_client_id is null or v_node_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   154	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + node_id + effective_from required'
   155	      using errcode = '22023';
   156	  end if;
   157	
   158	  -- Team-aktiv-check (uændret fra T9-supplement).
   159	  if not exists (
   160	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
   161	    where node_id = v_node_id and node_type = 'team' and is_active = true
   162	      and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   163	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   164	  ) then
   165	    raise exception 'client_placement_requires_active_team: %', v_node_id
   166	      using errcode = 'P0001';
   167	  end if;
   168	
   169	  -- V7/Trin 10 (krav-dok §3.4 + §2.5.2): klient skal findes og være aktiv.
   170	  -- Fanger pending oprettet mens aktiv, applied efter deaktivering.
   171	  select is_active into v_client_active
   172	    from core_identity.clients where id = v_client_id;
   173	  if not found then
   174	    raise exception 'apply_client_place: client_not_found: %', v_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   175	  end if;
   176	
   177	  -- V10 (Codex runde 9 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): bypass kan IKKE bruge is_admin()
   178	  -- fordi auth.uid() er NULL i cron-apply-context. Hent requester+approver fra
   179	  -- pending-rækken og tjek via employee-id-baseret helper.
   180	  v_admin_involved := false;
   181	  if p_pending_change_id is not null then
   182	    select requested_by, approved_by into v_requested_by, v_approved_by
   183	      from core_identity.pending_changes where id = p_pending_change_id;
   184	    v_admin_involved :=
   185	      core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(v_requested_by) or
   186	      (v_approved_by is not null and core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(v_approved_by));
   187	  end if;
   188	
   189	  if v_client_active = false and not v_admin_involved then
   190	    raise exception 'apply_client_place: client_inactive: % (krav-dok §2.5.2)', v_client_id
   191	      using errcode = 'P0001';
   192	  end if;
   193	
   194	  -- Resten af apply-handler-logikken er uændret fra T9-supplement
   195	  -- (20260520000000_t9_supplement.sql:321-350): find aktiv placement,
   196	  -- enten INSERT ny, UPDATE eksisterende eller split placement-række.
   197	  select * into v_active
   198	  from core_identity.client_node_placements
   199	  where client_id = v_client_id
   200	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   201	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   202	  limit 1;
   203	
   204	  if not found then
   205	    insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   206	      (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   207	    select v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from,
   208	      (select min(effective_from) from core_identity.client_node_placements
   209	       where client_id = v_client_id and effective_from > v_effective_from),
   210	      p_pending_change_id;
   211	  elsif v_active.effective_from = v_effective_from then
   212	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   213	    set node_id = v_node_id,
   214	        created_by_pending_change_id = coalesce(p_pending_change_id, created_by_pending_change_id),
   215	        updated_at = now()
   216	    where id = v_active.id;
   217	  else
   218	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   219	    set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   220	    where id = v_active.id;
   221	    insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   222	      (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   223	    values
   224	      (v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from, v_active.effective_to, p_pending_change_id);
   225	  end if;
   226	end; $$;
   227	
   228	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_place(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for M1-test compatibility
     2	--
     3	-- T10.13 seeder kun grant-modellen (permission_pages + permission_tabs +
     4	-- role_permission_grants). M1-permission-matrix-test scanner alle RPCs der
     5	-- kalder has_permission(...) og verificerer at superadmin har row i legacy
     6	-- role_page_permissions-tabel. Uden legacy-row fejler M1-test.
     7	--
     8	-- Legacy-pattern bevares til M1-test passes; senere kan legacy-rows fjernes
     9	-- når M1-test refactores til at læse grant-modellen direkte (G-nummer-kandidat).
    10	
    11	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
    12	select set_config('stork.allow_role_page_permissions_write', 'true', false);
    13	select set_config('stork.change_reason',
    14	  'T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for clients + client_field_definitions (M1-test compat)', false);
    15	
    16	insert into core_identity.role_page_permissions
    17	  (role_id, page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, scope)
    18	select (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin'),
    19	       page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, 'all'
    20	from (values
    21	  ('clients',                  'manage', true, true),
    22	  ('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true, true)
    23	) as perms(page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit)
    24	on conflict (role_id, page_key, coalesce(tab_key, '')) do nothing;
    25	-- Trin 10 T10.13c: REVERSE af T10.13b — fjern legacy role_page_permissions-rows
    26	--
    27	-- T10.13b tilføjede legacy-rows som workaround for M1-test compatibility.
    28	-- M1-test er nu refactored til at scanne grant-modellen (role_permission_grants)

    30	--
    31	-- Per Codex build-review runde 3: legacy-seed var "WORKAROUND-INTRODUCERET"

    33	-- fix ordentligt → refactor M1-test + fjern legacy.
    34	--
    35	-- has_permission har stadig legacy-fallback i sin body, men det er kun fallback;
    36	-- grant-modellen er primær. Legacy-rows for clients/cfd er ikke længere nødvendige.
    37	
    38	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
    39	select set_config('stork.allow_role_page_permissions_write', 'true', false);
    40	select set_config('stork.change_reason',
    41	  'T10.13c: fjern T10.13b legacy-rows (M1-test refactored til grant-modellen)', false);
    42	
    43	delete from core_identity.role_page_permissions
    44	where role_id = (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin')
    45	  and page_key in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')
    46	  and tab_key = 'manage';

exec
/bin/bash -lc 'git show --stat --patch --unified=40 HEAD -- supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql supabase/migrations/20260521000013_t10_seed_legacy_permissions.sql supabase/migrations/20260521000014_t10_remove_legacy_permissions.sql supabase/tests/smoke/m1_permission_matrix.sql' in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
commit ce84182f62baa0bb3c7c7a03a8931c988f0321da
Author: Mathias Grubak <mg@copenhagensales.dk>
Date:   Thu May 21 13:49:32 2026 +0200

    Trin 10 Codex-runde 3 fix: rolle-swap smoke-test + grant-model M1 + reverse legacy-seed
    
    Codex build-review runde 3 fandt 2 fund:
    1. T10.13b legacy-seed var workaround (plan V14 specificerede kun grant-model)
    2. Smoke-test brugte manuel pending-INSERT i stedet for wrapper-flow
    
    Fixes per Mathias-afgørelse 2026-05-21 ("Vigtigt at vi fixer det ordenligt"):
    
    Fund 1 — workaround fjernet:
    - T10.13c reverse-migration sletter legacy role_page_permissions-rows
      (clients/manage + client_field_definitions/manage for superadmin)
    - M1-test refactored: scanner nu grant-modellen (tab/page/area-grants)
      for has_permission-coverage i stedet for legacy
    
    Fund 2 — rolle-swap-pattern indført:
    - Smoke-test bruger eksisterende auth-backed superadmins (Kasper + Mathias)
      med midlertidig role-swap til non-admin
    - 2 buffer-admins (uden auth) sikrer admin-floor (min 2) under samtidig
      swap af begge auth-brugere i T3
    - T1-T7 dækker hele plan V14's matrix (success-paths, 22023, P0001,
      P0002, is_admin-bypass, requester-bypass, approver-bypass)
    - Non-admin rolle får tab-grants for clients/cfd-manage + page-grant
      for client_placements (har ingen tabs i grant-model)
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
---
 ...0260521000014_t10_remove_legacy_permissions.sql |  22 ++
 supabase/tests/smoke/m1_permission_matrix.sql      |  57 ++-
 supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql   | 392 +++++++++++++--------
 3 files changed, 301 insertions(+), 170 deletions(-)

diff --git a/supabase/migrations/20260521000014_t10_remove_legacy_permissions.sql b/supabase/migrations/20260521000014_t10_remove_legacy_permissions.sql
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c59b88d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/supabase/migrations/20260521000014_t10_remove_legacy_permissions.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+-- Trin 10 T10.13c: REVERSE af T10.13b — fjern legacy role_page_permissions-rows
+--
+-- T10.13b tilføjede legacy-rows som workaround for M1-test compatibility.
+-- M1-test er nu refactored til at scanne grant-modellen (role_permission_grants)
+-- direkte; legacy-rows er ikke længere nødvendige for testen.
+--
+-- Per Codex build-review runde 3: legacy-seed var "WORKAROUND-INTRODUCERET"
+-- (plan V14 specificerede kun grant-model). Mathias-afgørelse 2026-05-21:
+-- fix ordentligt → refactor M1-test + fjern legacy.
+--
+-- has_permission har stadig legacy-fallback i sin body, men det er kun fallback;
+-- grant-modellen er primær. Legacy-rows for clients/cfd er ikke længere nødvendige.
+
+select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
+select set_config('stork.allow_role_page_permissions_write', 'true', false);
+select set_config('stork.change_reason',
+  'T10.13c: fjern T10.13b legacy-rows (M1-test refactored til grant-modellen)', false);
+
+delete from core_identity.role_page_permissions
+where role_id = (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin')
+  and page_key in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')
+  and tab_key = 'manage';
diff --git a/supabase/tests/smoke/m1_permission_matrix.sql b/supabase/tests/smoke/m1_permission_matrix.sql
index 9039276..53d3a3d 100644
--- a/supabase/tests/smoke/m1_permission_matrix.sql
+++ b/supabase/tests/smoke/m1_permission_matrix.sql
@@ -1,56 +1,83 @@
--- M1 smoke: hver has_permission-RPC har matching role_page_permissions-row
--- for superadmin. Auto-asserter konsistens mellem RPC-koden og Q-SEED.
+-- M1 smoke: hver has_permission-RPC har matching grant for superadmin i grant-modellen.
+-- Auto-asserter konsistens mellem RPC-koden og permission-seeds.
+--
+-- T10.13b refactor 2026-05-21: tjekker grant-modellen (role_permission_grants)
+-- i stedet for legacy role_page_permissions. has_permission falder tilbage til
+-- legacy hvis grant-model ikke matcher, men M1's hovedformål er at verificere
+-- at den nye grant-model er fuld dækket — ikke at legacy holder.
 --
 -- Pattern-recognition: function-body indeholder
 --   has_permission('<page>', '<tab>', ...)
--- For hver (page, tab)-par fundet i function-bodies: verificér at
--- superadmin har permission-row med can_view=true og (afhængig af brug)
--- can_edit=true.
+-- For hver (page, tab)-par: verificér at superadmin har enten tab-grant,
+-- page-grant eller area-grant med can_access=true.
 
 do $test$
 declare
   v_rpc record;
   v_page text;
   v_tab text;
   v_superadmin_role_id uuid;
-  v_perm_exists boolean;
+  v_grant_exists boolean;
   v_missing text := '';
 begin
   select id into v_superadmin_role_id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin';
   if v_superadmin_role_id is null then
     raise exception 'M1 SETUP FAILED: superadmin-rolle findes ikke';
   end if;
 
   for v_rpc in
     select n.nspname || '.' || p.proname as fn,
            (regexp_matches(pg_get_functiondef(p.oid),
             'has_permission\(\s*''([^'']+)''\s*,\s*''([^'']+)''', 'g'))[1] as page_key,
            (regexp_matches(pg_get_functiondef(p.oid),
             'has_permission\(\s*''([^'']+)''\s*,\s*''([^'']+)''', 'g'))[2] as tab_key
     from pg_proc p
     join pg_namespace n on n.oid = p.pronamespace
     where n.nspname in ('core_identity','core_compliance','core_money')
       and p.prokind = 'f'
       and pg_get_functiondef(p.oid) ~ 'has_permission\('
   loop
     v_page := v_rpc.page_key;
     v_tab := v_rpc.tab_key;
 
+    -- Grant-model tjek: enten tab-grant, page-grant eller area-grant skal dække
+    -- (page, tab)-kombinationen med can_access=true.
     select exists (
-      select 1 from core_identity.role_page_permissions
-       where role_id = v_superadmin_role_id
-         and page_key = v_page
-         and coalesce(tab_key, '') = coalesce(v_tab, '')
-         and can_view = true
-    ) into v_perm_exists;
+      -- Tab-grant: matcher page+tab eksakt
+      select 1
+      from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
+      join core_identity.permission_tabs t on t.id = g.tab_id
+      join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = t.page_id
+      where g.role_id = v_superadmin_role_id
+        and g.can_access = true
+        and p.name = v_page
+        and t.name = v_tab
+      union all
+      -- Page-grant: matcher page (dækker alle tabs under page)
+      select 1
+      from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
+      join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = g.page_id
+      where g.role_id = v_superadmin_role_id
+        and g.can_access = true
+        and p.name = v_page
+      union all
+      -- Area-grant: matcher area der har page (dækker alle pages+tabs under area)
+      select 1
+      from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
+      join core_identity.permission_areas a on a.id = g.area_id
+      join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.area_id = a.id
+      where g.role_id = v_superadmin_role_id
+        and g.can_access = true
+        and p.name = v_page
+    ) into v_grant_exists;
 
-    if not v_perm_exists then
-      v_missing := v_missing || E'\n  - ' || v_rpc.fn || ' refererer ' || v_page || '/' || v_tab || ' men superadmin mangler row';
+    if not v_grant_exists then
+      v_missing := v_missing || E'\n  - ' || v_rpc.fn || ' refererer ' || v_page || '/' || v_tab || ' men superadmin mangler grant';
     end if;
   end loop;
 
   if length(v_missing) > 0 then
-    raise exception 'M1 FAILED: superadmin mangler permission-rows:%', v_missing;
+    raise exception 'M1 FAILED: superadmin mangler grant-model rows:%', v_missing;
   end if;
 end;
 $test$;
diff --git a/supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql b/supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql
index 94bb285..dd4e764 100644
--- a/supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql
+++ b/supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql
@@ -1,233 +1,315 @@
 -- Trin 10 T10.15: client active-check smoke-test (V7 + V10 + V13 + V14)
 --
--- TEST-BEGRÆNSNING: non-admin med auth_user_id kan ikke skabes i smoke-test
--- (employees.auth_user_id har FK til auth.users; auth.users er service-managed
--- og kan ikke INSERTes via smoke-tx). Derfor:
--- - Wrapper-flow-tests (T1, T5, T6): superadmin auth (fungerer fuldt)
--- - Non-admin requester/approver-scenarier (T3, T7, T8): manuel pending-INSERT
---   med specifikke requested_by/approved_by; apply-handler verificerer
---   is_admin_by_employee_id-logic via real employee-rows.
--- Test-pattern matcher T9-supplement-tests (også manuel pending-INSERT hvor
--- auth.users-FK forhindrer wrapper-call).
+-- ROLLE-SWAP-PATTERN (Codex build-review 3 LØS, Mathias-afgørelse 2026-05-21):
+-- brug eksisterende auth-backed superadmins (Kasper + Mathias) som test-brugere.
+-- Swap deres role_id midlertidigt til ny non-admin rolle for at simulere
+-- non-admin-context i wrapper-flow. ROLLBACK restorer ved test-slut.
+--
+-- ADMIN-FLOOR: opret buffer-admin (employee uden auth, superadmin-rolle) FØR
+-- rolle-swap så enforce_admin_floor altid har mindst 1 aktiv admin.
+--
+-- Tests:
+--   T1: superadmin → wrapper place aktiv klient → success
+--   T2: non-admin → wrapper place på inaktiv klient → 22023
+--   T3: non-admin requester + non-admin approver → apply efter inaktivering → P0001
+--   T4: superadmin → wrapper close inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check)
+--   T4a: superadmin → wrapper close non-existent → P0002
+--   T5: superadmin → wrapper place på inaktiv → success (is_admin-bypass)
+--   T6: superadmin → opret pending → deaktiver klient → admin approver → apply → success (requester-bypass)
+--   T7: non-admin requester + admin approver → apply efter inaktivering → success (approver-bypass)
 
 begin;
 
 select set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
 select set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T10 active-check smoke setup', true);
 select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
+
+-- Drop undo-period så vi kan apply direkte
 update core_identity.undo_settings
   set undo_period_seconds = 0
   where change_type in ('client_place', 'client_close');
 
 do $test$
 declare
-  v_client_id uuid;
-  v_client_b_id uuid;
-  v_client_c_id uuid;
-  v_client_d_id uuid;
-  v_client_e_id uuid;
+  v_superadmin_role_id uuid;
+  v_admin_a_id uuid;        -- Kasper (swappes til non-admin)
+  v_admin_a_auth uuid;
+  v_admin_a_orig_role uuid;
+  v_admin_b_id uuid;        -- Mathias (swappes/restoreres)
+  v_admin_b_auth uuid;
+  v_admin_b_orig_role uuid;
+  v_buffer_admin_id uuid;
+  v_non_admin_role_id uuid;
+  v_uuid_suffix text;
   v_team_node_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
   v_root_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
-  v_superadmin_auth_id uuid;
-  v_superadmin_emp_id uuid;
-  v_normal_role_id uuid;
-  v_normal_emp_id uuid;
-  v_uuid_suffix text;
+  v_client_active_id uuid;
+  v_client_inactive_id uuid;
+  v_client_t3 uuid;
+  v_client_t6 uuid;
+  v_client_t7 uuid;
   v_pending_id uuid;
   v_caught text;
 begin
   v_uuid_suffix := replace(gen_random_uuid()::text, '-', '');
 
-  -- Setup: find aktiv superadmin
-  select e.id, e.auth_user_id into v_superadmin_emp_id, v_superadmin_auth_id
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  -- SETUP A: find 2 auth-backed superadmins
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  select id into v_superadmin_role_id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin';
+
+  select e.id, e.auth_user_id, e.role_id
+    into v_admin_a_id, v_admin_a_auth, v_admin_a_orig_role
   from core_identity.employees e
   join core_identity.roles r on r.id = e.role_id
   where r.name = 'superadmin' and e.auth_user_id is not null
     and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
-  limit 1;
-  if v_superadmin_auth_id is null then
-    raise exception 'SETUP FAIL: ingen aktiv superadmin';
-  end if;
-  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_superadmin_auth_id::text, true);
+  order by e.first_name limit 1;
 
-  -- Setup: non-admin rolle + employee (UDEN auth_user_id pga. FK-begrænsning)
-  perform set_config('stork.allow_roles_write', 'true', true);
-  insert into core_identity.roles (name, description)
-  values ('t10_active_normal_' || v_uuid_suffix, 'non-admin')
-  returning id into v_normal_role_id;
+  select e.id, e.auth_user_id, e.role_id
+    into v_admin_b_id, v_admin_b_auth, v_admin_b_orig_role
+  from core_identity.employees e
+  join core_identity.roles r on r.id = e.role_id
+  where r.name = 'superadmin' and e.auth_user_id is not null
+    and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
+    and e.id <> v_admin_a_id
+  order by e.first_name limit 1;
 
-  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
-  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
-  values ('Normal', 'T10', 'normal_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_normal_role_id)
-  returning id into v_normal_emp_id;
+  if v_admin_a_id is null or v_admin_b_id is null then
+    raise exception 'SETUP FAIL: kræver 2 auth-backed superadmins (fandt A=% B=%)',
+      v_admin_a_id, v_admin_b_id;
+  end if;
 
-  -- Setup: org-tree med team
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  -- SETUP B: org-tree (team til wrapper-placement)
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   perform set_config('stork.allow_org_nodes_write', 'true', true);
   insert into core_identity.org_nodes (id) values (v_team_node_id), (v_root_id);
   perform set_config('stork.allow_org_node_versions_write', 'true', true);
   insert into core_identity.org_node_versions
     (node_id, name, parent_id, node_type, is_active, effective_from)
-  values (v_team_node_id, 't10-active team', v_root_id, 'team', true, current_date - 5);
-
-  -- ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-  -- T1: superadmin wrapper-flow på aktiv klient → success
-  -- ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-  v_client_id := core_identity.client_upsert('t10-active klient', '{}'::jsonb,
-    'T1 opret', true, null);
-  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_id, v_team_node_id, current_date - 1);
-  perform core_identity.pending_change_approve(v_pending_id);
-  perform core_identity.pending_change_apply(v_pending_id);
-  if not exists (
-    select 1 from core_identity.client_node_placements
-    where client_id = v_client_id and node_id = v_team_node_id and effective_to is null
-  ) then
-    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: placement mangler';
+  values (v_team_node_id, 't10-active team ' || v_uuid_suffix, v_root_id, 'team', true, current_date - 5);
+
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  -- SETUP C: 2 buffer-admins (uden auth) — sikrer admin-floor (min 2) under
+  -- samtidig swap af BÅDE Kasper og Mathias i T3
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
+  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
+  values ('BufferAdmin1', 't10_' || v_uuid_suffix,
+          'buffer_admin_1_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_superadmin_role_id)
+  returning id into v_buffer_admin_id;
+
+  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
+  values ('BufferAdmin2', 't10_' || v_uuid_suffix,
+          'buffer_admin_2_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_superadmin_role_id);
+
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  -- SETUP D: non-admin rolle med grant-model rows (clients + client_placements)
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  perform set_config('stork.allow_roles_write', 'true', true);
+  insert into core_identity.roles (name, description)
+  values ('t10_active_normal_' || v_uuid_suffix, 'T10 active-check non-admin test role')
+  returning id into v_non_admin_role_id;
+
+  -- Tab-grants for clients/manage + client_field_definitions/manage (eksisterer i grant-model).
+  insert into core_identity.role_permission_grants
+    (role_id, area_id, page_id, tab_id, can_access, can_write, visibility)
+  select v_non_admin_role_id, null, null, t.id, true, true, 'all'
+  from core_identity.permission_tabs t
+  join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = t.page_id
+  where p.name in ('clients','client_field_definitions') and t.name = 'manage';
+
+  -- Page-grant for client_placements: har ingen tabs, så has_permission falder
+  -- igennem til page-niveau (superadmin dækker via area-grant for org_structure).
+  -- Vi giver eksplicit page-grant her uden at give area-grant.
+  insert into core_identity.role_permission_grants
+    (role_id, area_id, page_id, tab_id, can_access, can_write, visibility)
+  select v_non_admin_role_id, null, p.id, null, true, true, 'all'
+  from core_identity.permission_pages p
+  where p.name = 'client_placements';
+
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  -- SETUP E: opret aktiv + inaktiv test-klient (som superadmin)
+  -- ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_a_auth::text, true);
+
+  v_client_active_id := core_identity.client_upsert(
+    'T10-active aktiv ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
+    'T10 setup: aktiv klient', true, null);
+
+  v_client_inactive_id := core_identity.client_upsert(
+    'T10-active inaktiv ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
+    'T10 setup: inaktiv klient', false, null);
+
+  v_client_t3 := core_identity.client_upsert(
+    'T10-active T3 ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
+    'T10 setup: T3 klient (aktiv → deaktiveres)', true, null);
+
+  v_client_t6 := core_identity.client_upsert(
+    'T10-active T6 ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
+    'T10 setup: T6 klient (aktiv → deaktiveres)', true, null);
+
+  v_client_t7 := core_identity.client_upsert(
+    'T10-active T7 ' || v_uuid_suffix, '{}'::jsonb,
+    'T10 setup: T7 klient (aktiv → deaktiveres)', true, null);
+
+  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+  -- T1: superadmin → wrapper place aktiv klient → success
+  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+  v_pending_id := core_identity.client_node_place(
+    v_client_active_id, v_team_node_id, current_date);
+  if v_pending_id is null then
+    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: client_node_place returnerede NULL';
   end if;
 
-  -- ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-  -- T2: deaktiver klient → apply-handler ramme aktiv-check uden admin → P0001
-  -- (Wrapper-test for inaktiv kræver non-admin auth; smoke-test bruger
-  -- direct _apply_client_place med null pending → ingen admin-involved.)
-  -- ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-  perform core_identity.client_set_active(v_client_id, false, 'T2 deaktiver');
+  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+  -- ROLLE-SWAP: Kasper → non-admin (1 admin tabt; buffer + Mathias = 2 admins)
+  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
+  update core_identity.employees set role_id = v_non_admin_role_id where id = v_admin_a_id;
+
+  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+  -- T2: non-admin (Kasper-swap) → wrapper place på inaktiv → 22023
+  -- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_admin_a_auth::text, true);
   begin
     v_caught := null;
-    perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
-      jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_id::text,
-                         'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
-                         'effective_from', current_date::text),
-      null
-    );
-  exception when sqlstate 'P0001' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
+    perform core_identity.client_node_place(v_client_inactive_id, v_team_node_id, current_date);
+  exception when sqlstate '22023' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   if v_caught is null then
-    raise exception 'T2 FAIL: apply skal P0001 ved inaktiv klient uden admin-bypass';
+    raise exception 'T2 FAIL: non-admin på inaktiv klient skal raise 22023 (client_inactive)';
   end if;
 
-  -- ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-  -- T3 (apply-path P0001): non-admin requester + non-admin approver
-  -- Manuel pending-INSERT (auth.users-FK forhindrer non-admin wrapper-flow).
-  -- ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-  v_client_b_id := core_identity.client_upsert('t10-active klient B', '{}'::jsonb,
-    'T3 opret', true, null);

    85	-- 1.2 undo_settings
    86	create policy undo_settings_insert on core_identity.undo_settings
    87	  for insert to authenticated
    88	  with check (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');

   120	
   121	-- 1.6 role_permission_grants
   122	-- NOTE: Eneste T9-tabel der får DELETE-policy. Verificeret: pending_changes /
   123	-- undo_settings / permission_areas / permission_pages / permission_tabs har
   124	-- ingen DELETE-veje (kun status-update + deactivate-flag-mønster). Kun
   125	-- role_permission_grant_remove udfører faktisk DELETE under FORCE RLS fra
   126	-- authenticated-kontekst.
   127	create policy role_permission_grants_insert on core_identity.role_permission_grants
   128	  for insert to authenticated
   129	  with check (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
   130	
   131	create policy role_permission_grants_update on core_identity.role_permission_grants
   132	  for update to authenticated
   133	  using (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
   134	
   135	create policy role_permission_grants_delete on core_identity.role_permission_grants
   136	  for delete to authenticated
   137	  using (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
   138	
   139	-- ─── DEL 2: 11 write-RPCs får session-var pattern ─────────────────────────
   140	--
   141	-- Pattern per RPC:
   142	--   1. has_permission-check (defense-in-depth, FØR autorisation)
   143	--   2. perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)
   144	--      (true = local til transaktion; var lækker ikke)
   145	--   3. Eksisterende set_config'er for audit (stork.source_type, stork.change_reason)
   146	--   4. Selve INSERT/UPDATE
   147	
   148	-- 2.1 pending_change_approve (Step 1, UPDATE pending_changes)
   149	--
   150	-- Mathias 2026-05-19 (T9-omstart-rammen punkt 12): Approve er ikke ny adgang.
   170	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_approve(
   171	  p_change_id uuid
   172	) returns void
   173	language plpgsql
   174	security invoker
   175	set search_path = ''
   176	as $$
   177	declare
   178	  v_change record;
   179	  v_approver uuid;
   180	  v_undo_period integer;
   181	  v_page_key text;
   182	begin
   183	  v_approver := core_identity.current_employee_id();
   184	  if v_approver is null then
   185	    raise exception 'no_authenticated_employee'
   186	      using errcode = '42501';
   187	  end if;
   188	
   189	  select * into v_change
   190	  from core_identity.pending_changes
   191	  where id = p_change_id
   192	  for update;
   193	
   194	  if not found then
   195	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_found %', p_change_id
   196	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   197	  end if;
   198	
   199	  if v_change.status <> 'pending' then
   200	    raise exception 'pending_change_wrong_status: % (expected pending)', v_change.status
   201	      using errcode = '22023';
   202	  end if;
   203	
   204	  -- Dispatcher: map change_type → underliggende ressource (page_key).
   205	  -- Approve af pending change kræver can_edit på samme page som ændringen rammer.
   206	  case v_change.change_type
   207	    when 'org_node_upsert'     then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   208	    when 'org_node_deactivate' then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   209	    when 'team_close'          then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   210	    when 'employee_place'      then v_page_key := 'employee_placements';
   211	    when 'employee_remove'     then v_page_key := 'employee_placements';
   212	    when 'client_place'        then v_page_key := 'client_placements';
   213	    when 'client_close'        then v_page_key := 'client_placements';
   214	    else
   215	      raise exception 'unknown_change_type for approve-gate: %', v_change.change_type
   216	        using errcode = '42883';
   217	  end case;
   218	
   219	  if not core_identity.has_permission(v_page_key, null, true) then
   220	    raise exception 'permission_denied: approve % kræver can_edit på %', v_change.change_type, v_page_key
   221	      using errcode = '42501';
   222	  end if;
   223	
   224	  if v_change.requested_by = v_approver and not core_identity.is_admin() then
   225	    raise exception 'pending_change_self_approve_forbidden'
   226	      using errcode = '42501', hint = 'requester må ikke selv approve (medmindre admin)';
   227	  end if;
   228	
   229	  select undo_period_seconds into v_undo_period
   230	  from core_identity.undo_settings
   231	  where change_type = v_change.change_type;
   232	
   233	  if v_undo_period is null then
   234	    v_undo_period := 24 * 3600;
   235	  end if;
   236	
   237	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   238	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   239	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'pending_change_approve', true);
   240	
   241	  update core_identity.pending_changes
   242	  set status = 'approved',
   243	      approved_by = v_approver,
   244	      approved_at = now(),
   245	      undo_deadline = now() + (v_undo_period || ' seconds')::interval,
   246	      updated_at = now()
   247	  where id = p_change_id;
   248	end;
   249	$$;
   250	revoke execute on function core_identity.pending_change_approve(uuid) from public, anon;
   251	
   252	-- 2.2 pending_change_undo (Step 1, UPDATE pending_changes)
   253	--
   254	-- Undo af pending change kræver samme can_edit-rettighed på underliggende
   255	-- ressource som approve af samme change. Dispatcher-mapping identisk med
   256	-- pending_change_approve.
   257	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_undo(
   258	  p_change_id uuid
   259	) returns void
   260	language plpgsql

   123	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_close(
   124	  p_payload jsonb,
   125	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   126	) returns void
   127	language plpgsql
   128	security definer
   129	set search_path = ''
   130	as $$
   131	declare
   132	  v_client_id uuid;
   133	  v_effective_from date;
   134	begin
   135	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   136	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   137	
   138	  if v_client_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   139	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + effective_from required'
   140	      using errcode = '22023';
   141	  end if;
   142	
   143	  update core_identity.client_node_placements
   144	  set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   145	  where client_id = v_client_id and effective_to is null;
   146	end;
   147	$$;
   148	
   149	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_close(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   150	
   151	-- ─── CREATE OR REPLACE pending_change_apply: tilføj 2 cases ─────────────
   152	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_apply(
   153	  p_change_id uuid
   154	) returns void
   155	language plpgsql
   156	security definer
   157	set search_path = ''

   166	
   167	  if not found then
   168	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_found %', p_change_id
   169	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   170	  end if;
