   360	) returns void
   361	language plpgsql
   362	security definer
   363	set search_path = ''
   364	as $$
   365	declare
   366	  v_client_id uuid;
   367	  v_effective_from date;
   368	  v_active record;
   369	begin
   370	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   371	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   372	
   373	  if v_client_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   374	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + effective_from required'
   375	      using errcode = '22023';
   376	  end if;
   377	
   378	  select * into v_active
   379	  from core_identity.client_node_placements
   380	  where client_id = v_client_id
   381	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   382	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   383	  limit 1;
   384	
   385	  if not found then
   386	    return;
   387	  elsif v_active.effective_from = v_effective_from then
   388	    delete from core_identity.client_node_placements where id = v_active.id;
   389	  elsif v_active.effective_to = v_effective_from then
   390	    return;
   391	  else
   392	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   393	    set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   394	    where id = v_active.id;
   395	  end if;
   396	end;
   397	$$;
   398	
   399	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_close(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   400	
   401	-- ─── _apply_org_node_upsert (org_node_versions — split-at-boundary) ──────
   402	create or replace function core_identity._apply_org_node_upsert(
   403	  p_payload jsonb,
   404	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   405	) returns void
   406	language plpgsql
   407	security definer
   408	set search_path = ''
   409	as $$
   410	declare
   411	  v_node_id uuid;
   412	  v_name text;
   413	  v_parent_id uuid;
   414	  v_node_type text;
   415	  v_is_active boolean;
   416	  v_effective_from date;
   417	  v_is_new boolean;
   418	  v_active record;
   419	begin
   420	  v_node_id := nullif(p_payload->>'id', '')::uuid;
   421	  v_name := p_payload->>'name';
   422	  v_parent_id := nullif(p_payload->>'parent_id', '')::uuid;
   423	  v_node_type := p_payload->>'node_type';
   424	  v_is_active := coalesce((p_payload->>'is_active')::boolean, true);
   425	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   426	
   427	  if v_name is null or v_node_type is null or v_effective_from is null then
   428	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: name + node_type + effective_from required'
   429	      using errcode = '22023';
   430	  end if;
   431	
   432	  v_is_new := v_node_id is null or not exists (
   433	    select 1 from core_identity.org_nodes where id = v_node_id
   434	  );
   435	
   436	  if v_is_new then
   437	    if v_node_id is null then
   438	      v_node_id := gen_random_uuid();
   439	    end if;
   440	    insert into core_identity.org_nodes (id) values (v_node_id);
   441	
   442	    -- Pre-history-INSERT: ingen tidligere versions for ny node.
   443	    insert into core_identity.org_node_versions
   444	      (node_id, name, parent_id, node_type, is_active, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   445	    values
   446	      (v_node_id, v_name, v_parent_id, v_node_type, v_is_active, v_effective_from, null, p_pending_change_id);
   447	    return;
   448	  end if;
   449	
   450	  -- EXISTING: find aktivt version på v_effective_from.
   451	  select * into v_active
   452	  from core_identity.org_node_versions
   453	  where node_id = v_node_id
   454	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   455	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   456	  limit 1;
   457	
   458	  if not found then
   459	    -- Pre-history for eksisterende node: INSERT med effective_to = min(efterfølgende).
   460	    insert into core_identity.org_node_versions

     1	-- Trin 10 / §4 trin 10: clients + client_field_definitions
     2	--
     3	-- T10.1: core_identity.clients (greenfield — D5's public.clients droppet i T1).
     4	-- T10.2: core_identity.client_field_definitions (global key UNIQUE; pr-klient
     5	-- værdier i clients.fields jsonb per Mathias-pragmatik 2026-05-20).
     6	--
     7	-- Krav-dok-konformitet:
     8	--  §2.4 logo-support (bytea + content_type + filename + consistency-CHECK)
     9	--  §2.5.1 anonymiseres ikke (ingen anonymized_at; ingen DELETE-policy)
    10	--  §2.5.2 aktiv/inaktiv-livscyklus (is_active bool)
    11	--  §2.3 felt-definitioner (key, display_name, field_type, required, pii_level,
    12	--                          display_order, is_active)
    13	--  §2.6.1 rettigheder i UI (has_permission-baserede policies, tab-aware 'manage')
    14	--
    15	-- DML-GRANT obligatorisk: T1-default-privileges giver kun execute på functions;
    16	-- tabeller skal eksplicit grants for at RLS-policies + session-vars kan tage over.
    17	
    18	-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    19	-- T10.1: core_identity.clients
    20	-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    21	
    22	-- no-dedup-key: master-data; id er stable PK. Klient-rækker bevares evigt
    23	-- (krav-dok §2.5.1: ikke-anonymiseret), inaktivering via is_active=false.
    24	create table core_identity.clients (
    25	  id            uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
    26	  name          text not null check (length(trim(name)) > 0),
    27	  fields        jsonb not null default '{}'::jsonb,
    28	  is_active     boolean not null default true,
    29	  logo_bytes    bytea,
    30	  logo_content_type text,
    31	  logo_filename text,
    32	  created_at    timestamptz not null default now(),
    33	  updated_at    timestamptz not null default now(),
    34	  -- fields skal være jsonb object — scalar/array forhindres (V2 KRITISK)
    35	  constraint clients_fields_is_object check (jsonb_typeof(fields) = 'object'),
    36	  -- logo-felter sættes alle eller intet (V3 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL)
    37	  constraint clients_logo_consistency check (
    38	    (logo_bytes is null and logo_content_type is null and logo_filename is null)
    39	    or
    40	    (logo_bytes is not null and logo_content_type is not null and logo_filename is not null)
    41	  )
    42	);
    43	
    44	comment on table core_identity.clients is
    45	  'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Logo som bytea (krav-dok §2.4). Klient anonymiseres ikke (krav-dok §2.5.1) — derfor ingen anonymized_at-kolonne.';
    46	
    47	create index clients_active_idx on core_identity.clients (id) where is_active = true;
    48	
    49	create trigger clients_set_updated_at
    50	  before update on core_identity.clients
    51	  for each row execute function core_compliance.set_updated_at();
    52	
    53	create trigger clients_audit
    54	  after insert or update or delete on core_identity.clients
    55	  for each row execute function core_compliance.stork_audit();
    56	
    57	alter table core_identity.clients enable row level security;
    58	alter table core_identity.clients force row level security;
    59	
    60	revoke all on table core_identity.clients from public, anon, service_role;
    61	grant select on table core_identity.clients to authenticated;
    62	-- DML-GRANT obligatorisk (Codex V4 KRITISK): RLS-policy + session-var
    63	-- kan ikke virke før DML-GRANT er på plads. Ingen DELETE-grant — inaktivering
    64	-- via is_active=false (krav-dok §2.5.2).
    65	grant insert, update on table core_identity.clients to authenticated;
    66	
    67	-- SELECT-policy: tab-aware has_permission ('manage'). T10.13 seeder kun
    68	-- tab-grants → null-tab matcher ikke; 'manage' matcher.
    69	create policy clients_select on core_identity.clients
    70	  for select to authenticated
    71	  using (core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', false));
    72	
    73	create policy clients_insert on core_identity.clients
    74	  for insert to authenticated
    75	  with check (current_setting('stork.allow_clients_write', true) = 'true');
    76	
    77	create policy clients_update on core_identity.clients
    78	  for update to authenticated
    79	  using (current_setting('stork.allow_clients_write', true) = 'true')
    80	  with check (current_setting('stork.allow_clients_write', true) = 'true');
    81	
    82	-- DELETE: ingen policy = default deny. Inaktiver via is_active=false.
    83	
    84	-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    85	-- T10.2: core_identity.client_field_definitions
    86	-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    87	
    88	-- no-dedup-key: konfig-tabel; key er natural key (UNIQUE). Inaktiveres
    89	-- via is_active=false, slettes ikke (krav-dok §2.3.2 udfasede felter bevares).
    90	create table core_identity.client_field_definitions (
    91	  id            uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
    92	  key           text not null unique check (length(trim(key)) > 0),
    93	  display_name  text not null check (length(trim(display_name)) > 0),
    94	  field_type    text not null check (length(trim(field_type)) > 0),
    95	  required      boolean not null default false,
    96	  pii_level     text not null check (pii_level in ('none', 'indirect', 'direct')),
    97	  display_order integer not null default 0,
    98	  is_active     boolean not null default true,
    99	  created_at    timestamptz not null default now(),
   100	  updated_at    timestamptz not null default now()
   101	);
   102	
   103	comment on table core_identity.client_field_definitions is
   104	  'Trin 10: global registry af klient-felt-definitioner. key er jsonb-property-name i clients.fields; UNIQUE globalt (Mathias-pragmatik 2026-05-20: ligeglad med listestruktur så længe forretningsgangen overholdes). field_type er fri-tekst (UI håndhæver format). pii_level styrer hash i audit_filter_values for clients.fields-jsonb-walking. Udfasede felter sættes is_active=false (krav-dok §2.3.2: ikke DELETE).';
   105	
   106	create index client_field_definitions_active_idx
   107	  on core_identity.client_field_definitions (key, display_order)
   108	  where is_active = true;
   109	
   110	create index client_field_definitions_direct_pii_idx
   111	  on core_identity.client_field_definitions (key)
   112	  where pii_level = 'direct' and is_active = true;
   113	
   114	create trigger client_field_definitions_set_updated_at
   115	  before update on core_identity.client_field_definitions
   116	  for each row execute function core_compliance.set_updated_at();
   117	
   118	create trigger client_field_definitions_audit
   119	  after insert or update or delete on core_identity.client_field_definitions
   120	  for each row execute function core_compliance.stork_audit();
   121	
   122	alter table core_identity.client_field_definitions enable row level security;
   123	alter table core_identity.client_field_definitions force row level security;
   124	
   125	revoke all on table core_identity.client_field_definitions from public, anon, service_role;
   126	grant select on table core_identity.client_field_definitions to authenticated;
   127	-- DML-GRANT obligatorisk for write-RPC-veje (Codex V4 KRITISK).
   128	grant insert, update on table core_identity.client_field_definitions to authenticated;
   129	
   130	-- SELECT-policy: tab-aware has_permission ('manage').
   131	create policy client_field_definitions_select on core_identity.client_field_definitions
   132	  for select to authenticated
   133	  using (core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', false));
   134	
   135	create policy client_field_definitions_insert on core_identity.client_field_definitions
   136	  for insert to authenticated
   137	  with check (current_setting('stork.allow_client_field_definitions_write', true) = 'true');
   138	
   139	create policy client_field_definitions_update on core_identity.client_field_definitions
   140	  for update to authenticated
   141	  using (current_setting('stork.allow_client_field_definitions_write', true) = 'true')
   142	  with check (current_setting('stork.allow_client_field_definitions_write', true) = 'true');
   143	
   144	-- DELETE: ingen policy = default deny. Inaktiver via is_active=false.

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.8 + T10.9: client_upsert + client_set_active RPC'er
     2	--
     3	-- client_upsert: SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC. has_permission('clients', 'manage', true).
     4	-- INSERT-branch bruger p_is_active (default true for nye klienter).
     5	-- UPDATE-branch rør IKKE is_active (V8 Code walk-through #2: forhindrer
     6	-- utilsigtet reaktivering ved navne-ændring). UPDATE rør IKKE logo (V3 KRITISK-
     7	-- SIKKERHEDSHUL: forhindrer datatab). Toggle via client_set_active; logo via
     8	-- client_logo_set/clear.
     9	--
    10	-- client_set_active: dedikeret toggle-RPC. Adskilt RPC fordi UI-flow er distinkt
    11	-- ("deaktiver klient" vs "redigér klient"). Matcher krav-dok §3.1's distinct
    12	-- "Deaktivér klient"-funktion.
    13	
    14	-- Drop D5's signatur (Public.client_upsert blev droppet af T1; greenfield i core_identity).
    15	-- Ingen drop nødvendig — første gang vi opretter i core_identity.
    16	
    17	create or replace function core_identity.client_upsert(
    18	  p_name text,
    19	  p_fields jsonb,
    20	  p_change_reason text,
    21	  p_is_active boolean default true,
    22	  p_client_id uuid default null
    23	) returns uuid
    24	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    25	as $$
    26	declare
    27	  v_id uuid;
    28	begin
    29	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', true) then
    30	    raise exception 'client_upsert: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    31	  end if;
    32	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
    33	    raise exception 'client_upsert: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
    34	  end if;
    35	  if p_name is null or length(trim(p_name)) = 0 then
    36	    raise exception 'client_upsert: name er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
    37	  end if;
    38	
    39	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    40	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
    41	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
    42	
    43	  if p_client_id is null then
    44	    -- INSERT: p_is_active anvendes (default true for nye klienter)
    45	    insert into core_identity.clients (name, fields, is_active)
    46	    values (p_name, coalesce(p_fields, '{}'::jsonb), p_is_active)
    47	    returning id into v_id;
    48	  else
    49	    -- V8 (Code walk-through #2): UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. Brug client_set_active.
    50	    -- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): UPDATE rør IKKE logo. Brug client_logo_set/clear.
    51	    update core_identity.clients
    52	      set name = p_name,
    53	          fields = coalesce(p_fields, '{}'::jsonb)
    54	     where id = p_client_id
    55	     returning id into v_id;
    56	    if v_id is null then
    57	      raise exception 'client_upsert: client % findes ikke', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
    58	    end if;
    59	  end if;
    60	
    61	  return v_id;
    62	end;
    63	$$;
    64

    66	  'T10.8: INSERT-eller-UPDATE klient. UPDATE rør ikke is_active eller logo (V8 + V3 forhindrer utilsigtet reaktivering/datatab). Toggle via client_set_active; logo via client_logo_set/clear.';
    67

    69	grant execute on function core_identity.client_upsert(text, jsonb, text, boolean, uuid) to authenticated;

    71	-- ─── client_set_active: toggler is_active uden at røre øvrige felter ─────
    72	create or replace function core_identity.client_set_active(
    73	  p_client_id uuid,

    75	  p_change_reason text
    76	) returns void
    77	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    78	as $$
    79	begin

   100	comment on function core_identity.client_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) is
   101	  'T10.9: toggler is_active uden at røre øvrige felter (krav-dok §3.1 distinct Deaktivér-funktion). Matcher client_logo_set/clear-mønstret.';
   102	
   103	revoke all on function core_identity.client_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) from public, anon;
   104	grant execute on function core_identity.client_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) to authenticated;
   105	-- Trin 10 T10.10 + T10.10a: client_field_definition_upsert + _set_active
   106	--
   107	-- T10.10: SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions.
   108	-- has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true).
   109	-- INSERT-branch bruger p_is_active. UPDATE-branch rør IKKE is_active (V8).
   110	--
   111	-- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): key + pii_level direct→non-direct
   112	-- effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions. Forhindrer audit-PII-datalæk:
   113	-- audit-hashing i clients.fields binder til key; eksisterende værdier ville
   114	-- pludselig skrives i klartekst hvis pii-niveau sænkes. SUPERADMIN BYPASSER IKKE
   115	-- (Mathias 2026-05-21: sikkerheds-invariants > "superadmin må alt").
   116	--
   117	-- T10.10a: client_field_definition_set_active — toggler is_active. Matcher
   118	-- krav-dok §3.2's distinct "Deaktivér felt-definition"-funktion + client_set_active-mønstret.
   119	
   120	create or replace function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
   121	  p_key text,
   122	  p_display_name text,
   123	  p_field_type text,
   124	  p_pii_level text,
   125	  p_change_reason text,
   126	  p_required boolean default false,
   127	  p_display_order integer default 0,
   128	  p_is_active boolean default true,
   129	  p_field_id uuid default null
   130	) returns uuid
   131	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   132	as $$
   133	declare
   134	  v_id uuid;
   135	  v_existing_key text;
   136	  v_existing_pii text;
   137	begin
   138	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true) then
   139	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   140	  end if;
   141	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
   142	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
   143	  end if;
   144	  if p_pii_level not in ('none', 'indirect', 'direct') then
   145	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: pii_level skal vaere none/indirect/direct' using errcode = '22023';
   146	  end if;
   147	
   148	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   149	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
   150	  perform set_config('stork.allow_client_field_definitions_write', 'true', true);
   151	
   152	  if p_field_id is null then
   153	    insert into core_identity.client_field_definitions
   154	      (key, display_name, field_type, required, pii_level, display_order, is_active)
   155	    values
   156	      (p_key, p_display_name, p_field_type, p_required, p_pii_level, p_display_order, p_is_active)
   157	    returning id into v_id;
   158	  else
   159	    -- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): forbyd key-rename og direct → non-direct
   160	    -- for eksisterende definitions. Audit-PII-hashing i clients.fields stoler på at
   161	    -- key+pii_level er stabile for værdier der allerede ligger i jsonb.
   162	    -- INGEN superadmin-bypass: sikkerheds-invariant > "superadmin må alt".
   163	    select key, pii_level into v_existing_key, v_existing_pii
   164	      from core_identity.client_field_definitions
   165	     where id = p_field_id;
   166	    if not found then
   167	      raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: field % findes ikke', p_field_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   168	    end if;
   169	    if v_existing_key is distinct from p_key then
   170	      raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: key er immutable (% -> %). For at omdøbe: marker eksisterende felt is_active=false og INSERT et nyt.', v_existing_key, p_key
   171	        using errcode = '22023', hint = 'Audit-PII-hash i clients.fields binder til key.';
   172	    end if;
   173	    if v_existing_pii = 'direct' and p_pii_level <> 'direct' then
   174	      raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: pii_level direct -> % afvist. Eksisterende vaerdier i clients.fields ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit-log.', p_pii_level
   175	        using errcode = '22023', hint = 'For at saenke pii-niveau: INSERT ny definition med ny key.';
   176	    end if;
   177	
   178	    -- V8 (Code walk-through #3): UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. Brug client_field_definition_set_active.
   179	    update core_identity.client_field_definitions
   180	      set display_name = p_display_name,
   181	          field_type = p_field_type,
   182	          required = p_required,
   183	          pii_level = p_pii_level,
   184	          display_order = p_display_order
   185	          -- key rør'es ikke (immutable verificeret ovenfor)
   186	          -- is_active rør IKKE (brug client_field_definition_set_active)
   187	     where id = p_field_id
   188	     returning id into v_id;
   189	  end if;
   190	
   191	  return v_id;
   192	end;
   193	$$;
   194	
   195	comment on function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(text, text, text, text, text, boolean, integer, boolean, uuid) is
   196	  'T10.10: INSERT-eller-UPDATE felt-definition. key + pii_level (direct→non-direct) immutable for eksisterende (V3 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL). UPDATE rør ikke is_active (V8). pii_level escalation none→indirect→direct tilladt. Sikkerheds-invariants bypasses ikke for superadmin.';
   197	
   198	revoke all on function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(text, text, text, text, text, boolean, integer, boolean, uuid) from public, anon;
   199	grant execute on function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(text, text, text, text, text, boolean, integer, boolean, uuid) to authenticated;
   200

   235	-- Trin 10 T10.11: client_logo_set + client_logo_clear + client_logo_get
   236	--
   237	-- Dedikerede RPC'er for logo. Adskilt fra client_upsert for at forhindre
   238	-- datatab (V3 Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL: default-null-parametre i upsert
   239	-- ville utilsigtet slette logo ved name/fields-UPDATE).
   240	--
   241	-- client_logo_set: alle tre logo-felter atomisk (matcher T10.1's
   242	-- clients_logo_consistency CHECK).
   243	-- client_logo_clear: nulstiller alle tre atomisk.
   244	-- client_logo_get: returnerer bytea + content_type + filename for caller.
   245	
   246	create or replace function core_identity.client_logo_set(
   247	  p_client_id uuid,
   248	  p_logo_bytes bytea,
   249	  p_logo_content_type text,
   250	  p_logo_filename text,
   251	  p_change_reason text
   252	) returns void
   253	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   254	as $$
   255	begin
   256	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', true) then
   257	    raise exception 'client_logo_set: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   258	  end if;
   259	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
   260	    raise exception 'client_logo_set: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
   261	  end if;
   262	  if p_logo_bytes is null or p_logo_content_type is null or p_logo_filename is null then
   263	    raise exception 'client_logo_set: alle tre logo-felter er paakraevede (brug client_logo_clear for at fjerne)' using errcode = '22023';
   264	  end if;
   265	
   266	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   267	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
   268	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
   269	
   270	  update core_identity.clients
   271	    set logo_bytes = p_logo_bytes,
   272	        logo_content_type = p_logo_content_type,
   273	        logo_filename = p_logo_filename
   274	   where id = p_client_id;
   275	  if not found then
   276	    raise exception 'client_logo_set: client % findes ikke', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   277	  end if;
   278	end;
   279	$$;
   280	
   281	revoke all on function core_identity.client_logo_set(uuid, bytea, text, text, text) from public, anon;
   282	grant execute on function core_identity.client_logo_set(uuid, bytea, text, text, text) to authenticated;
   283	
   284	-- ─── client_logo_clear: nulstiller alle tre logo-felter atomisk ─────────
   285	create or replace function core_identity.client_logo_clear(
   286	  p_client_id uuid,
   287	  p_change_reason text
   288	) returns void
   289	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   290	as $$
   291	begin
   292	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', true) then
   293	    raise exception 'client_logo_clear: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   294	  end if;
   295	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
   296	    raise exception 'client_logo_clear: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
   297	  end if;
   298	
   299	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   300	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
   301	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
   302	
   303	  update core_identity.clients
   304	    set logo_bytes = null,
   305	        logo_content_type = null,
   306	        logo_filename = null
   307	   where id = p_client_id;

   310	  end if;
   311	end;
   312	$$;
   313	
   314	revoke all on function core_identity.client_logo_clear(uuid, text) from public, anon;
   315	grant execute on function core_identity.client_logo_clear(uuid, text) to authenticated;
   316	
   317	-- ─── client_logo_get: SECURITY INVOKER read-RPC ─────────────────────────
   318	create or replace function core_identity.client_logo_get(p_client_id uuid)
   319	returns table (logo_bytes bytea, logo_content_type text, logo_filename text)
   320	language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
   321	as $$
   322	begin
   323	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', false) then
   324	    raise exception 'client_logo_get: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   325	  end if;
   326	  return query
   327	    select c.logo_bytes, c.logo_content_type, c.logo_filename
   328	      from core_identity.clients c
   329	     where c.id = p_client_id and c.logo_bytes is not null;
   330	end; $$;
   331	
   332	comment on function core_identity.client_logo_get(uuid) is
   333	  'T10.11: returner logo (bytea + metadata) for klient. SECURITY INVOKER. Tab-aware permission (V6).';
   334	
   335	revoke all on function core_identity.client_logo_get(uuid) from public, anon;
   336	grant execute on function core_identity.client_logo_get(uuid) to authenticated;
   337	-- Trin 10 T10.12: read-RPC'er for klient + felt-definitioner
   338	--
   339	-- client_get: hent én klient med metadata (has_logo bool — logo hentes via
   340	--             dedikeret client_logo_get for at undgå unødigt bytea-payload).
   341	-- client_list: list alle klienter (aktive + inaktive per krav-dok §3.1).
   342	-- client_field_definitions_list: list felt-definitioner (filter på is_active).
   343	--
   344	-- Tab-aware has_permission ('manage', false) per V6-fix: null-tab matcher
   345	-- ikke T10.13's tab-grants. SECURITY INVOKER — caller's role + RLS-policy gælder.
   346	
   347	create or replace function core_identity.client_get(p_client_id uuid)
   348	returns table (
   349	  id uuid,
   350	  name text,
   351	  fields jsonb,
   352	  is_active boolean,
   353	  logo_content_type text,
   354	  logo_filename text,
   355	  has_logo boolean,
   356	  created_at timestamptz,
   357	  updated_at timestamptz
   358	) language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
   359	as $$
   360	begin
   361	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', false) then
   362	    raise exception 'client_get: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   363	  end if;
   364	  return query
   365	    select c.id, c.name, c.fields, c.is_active,
   366	           c.logo_content_type, c.logo_filename,
   367	           c.logo_bytes is not null,
   368	           c.created_at, c.updated_at
   369	      from core_identity.clients c
   370	     where c.id = p_client_id;
   371	end; $$;
   372	
   373	comment on function core_identity.client_get(uuid) is
   374	  'T10.12: hent én klient. has_logo bool i stedet for bytea (logo via dedikeret client_logo_get). Tab-aware permission.';
   375	
   376	revoke all on function core_identity.client_get(uuid) from public, anon;
   377	grant execute on function core_identity.client_get(uuid) to authenticated;
   378	
   379	-- ─── client_list: alle klienter (aktive + inaktive per krav-dok §3.1) ───
   380	create or replace function core_identity.client_list()
   381	returns table (
   382	  id uuid, name text, is_active boolean,
   383	  has_logo boolean, created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz
   384	) language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
   385	as $$
   386	begin
   387	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', false) then
   388	    raise exception 'client_list: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   389	  end if;
   390	  return query
   391	    select c.id, c.name, c.is_active, c.logo_bytes is not null,
   392	           c.created_at, c.updated_at
   393	      from core_identity.clients c
   394	     order by c.name asc;
   395	end; $$;
   396	
   397	comment on function core_identity.client_list() is
   398	  'T10.12: list alle klienter (aktive + inaktive per krav-dok §3.1 "Hent klient-liste"). Tab-aware permission.';
   399	
   400	revoke all on function core_identity.client_list() from public, anon;
   401	grant execute on function core_identity.client_list() to authenticated;
   402	
   403	-- ─── client_field_definitions_list: list felt-def ───────────────────────
   404	-- p_include_inactive default false: standard returnerer kun aktive (krav-dok §3.2
   405	-- "Hent felt-definitioner: alle aktive"). p_include_inactive=true for fuld liste.
   406	--
   407	-- T10.16 tilføjer denne RPC til LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS (Codex V1
   408	-- MELLEM #3): client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status-kolonne.
   409	create or replace function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(p_include_inactive boolean default false)
   410	returns setof core_identity.client_field_definitions
   411	language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
   412	as $$
   413	begin
   414	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', false) then
   415	    raise exception 'client_field_definitions_list: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   416	  end if;
   417	  return query
   418	    select * from core_identity.client_field_definitions
   419	     where p_include_inactive or is_active = true
   420	     order by display_order, key;
   421	end; $$;
   422	
   423	comment on function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(boolean) is
   424	  'T10.12: list felt-definitioner. Default kun aktive (krav-dok §3.2). p_include_inactive=true for fuld liste. R7d-allowlist via T10.16.';
   425	
   426	revoke all on function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(boolean) from public, anon;
   427	grant execute on function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(boolean) to authenticated;

exec
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260521000006_t10_seed_permissions.sql | sed -n '1,220p'" in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.13: seed permissions i grant-modellen
     2	--
     3	-- Tilføjer 2 nye pages (clients, client_field_definitions) under eksisterende
     4	-- org_structure-area + manage-tab pr. page + superadmin grants.
     5	--
     6	-- V6 fix (Code-validering #5): legacy role_page_permissions seedes IKKE.
     7	-- Grant-modellen (permission_pages + permission_tabs + role_permission_grants)
     8	-- er primær fra T9; legacy er kun fallback.
     9	--
    10	-- V4 fix (Codex V3 KRITISK): stork.t9_write_authorized SKAL sættes — T9-supplements
    11	-- INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants kræver det.
    12	--
    13	-- V9 robusthed (Codex V8 G-nummer ADOPT): queries scope'es til org_structure-area
    14	-- via JOIN på area_id. Forhindrer fremtidig kollision hvis samme page-navn
    15	-- tilføjes i andet area.
    16	
    17	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
    18	select set_config('stork.change_reason',
    19	  'T10.13: seed permissions for trin 10 RPCs i grant-modellen', false);
    20	-- T9-supplements INSERT-policies kræver session-var.
    21	select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false);
    22	
    23	-- 1. Pages under org_structure-area
    24	with org_area as (
    25	  select id from core_identity.permission_areas where name = 'org_structure'
    26	)
    27	insert into core_identity.permission_pages (area_id, name)
    28	select org_area.id, page_name
    29	from org_area, (values ('clients'), ('client_field_definitions')) as p(page_name)
    30	on conflict (area_id, name) do nothing;
    31	
    32	-- 2. Tabs: 'manage' for hver ny page (V9: scope til org_structure-area)
    33	insert into core_identity.permission_tabs (page_id, name)
    34	select p.id, 'manage'
    35	from core_identity.permission_pages p
    36	join core_identity.permission_areas a on a.id = p.area_id
    37	where p.name in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')
    38	  and a.name = 'org_structure'
    39	on conflict (page_id, name) do nothing;
    40	
    41	-- 3. Superadmin grants på tab-niveau (V9: scope til org_structure-area)
    42	insert into core_identity.role_permission_grants
    43	  (role_id, area_id, page_id, tab_id, can_access, can_write, visibility)
    44	select
    45	  (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin'),

   285	-- none → indirect → direct accepteres. V8: UPDATE rør IKKE is_active.
   286

   290	declare

   292	  v_caught text;
   293	  v_count integer;
   294	  v_superadmin_auth_id uuid;

   303	  where r.name = 'superadmin'
   304	    and e.auth_user_id is not null
   305	    and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
   306	  limit 1;
   307	  if v_superadmin_auth_id is null then

   309	  end if;

   311	
   312	  -- ─── T1: INSERT felt-definition ─────────────────────────────────────

   314	    'telefon',           -- p_key
   315	    'Telefon',           -- p_display_name
   316	    'phone',             -- p_field_type
   317	    'direct',            -- p_pii_level
   318	    'T10-cfd T1: opret', -- p_change_reason
   319	    false,               -- p_required
   320	    10,                  -- p_display_order
   321	    true,                -- p_is_active

   323	  );

   336	      'direct',
   337	      'T10-cfd T2: forsøg key-rename',
   338	      false, 10, true,

   341	  exception when sqlstate '22023' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   342	  if v_caught is null then
   343	    raise exception 'T2 FAIL (V3 KRITISK): UPDATE af key skal afvises (immutable)';
   344	  end if;

   358	  end if;

exec
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260521000004_t10_audit_filter_values.sql | sed -n '1,260p'" in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.5: omskrive core_compliance.audit_filter_values med clients-fields-jsonb-walking
     2	--
     3	-- T1's audit_filter_values (20260514120006:9-86) walker kun top-level kolonner og
     4	-- hashes pii_level='direct'. Trin 10 udvider med special-case for core_identity.clients:
     5	-- walker fields-jsonb-keys og hashes hver key der har pii_level='direct' i
     6	-- client_field_definitions.
     7	--
     8	-- V2-fix (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): INGEN is_active-filter på direct-PII keys.
     9	-- Hashes alle direct-PII definitioner uanset is_active for at undgå datalæk når
    10	-- felt deaktiveres med eksisterende værdier stadig i clients.fields.
    11	--
    12	-- STABLE SECURITY DEFINER + set search_path = '' (matcher T1-pattern).
    13	-- Resten af T1-logik bevares uændret (top-level walking + unclassified-check).
    14	
    15	create or replace function core_compliance.audit_filter_values(
    16	  p_schema text,
    17	  p_table text,
    18	  p_values jsonb
    19	)
    20	returns jsonb
    21	language plpgsql stable security definer set search_path = ''
    22	as $$
    23	declare
    24	  v_result jsonb := p_values;
    25	  v_def record;
    26	  v_strict boolean := current_setting('stork.audit_filter_strict', true) = 'true';
    27	  v_has_defs boolean;
    28	  v_key text;
    29	  v_fields jsonb;
    30	  v_field_key text;
    31	  v_field_value jsonb;
    32	begin
    33	  if p_values is null then
    34	    return null;
    35	  end if;
    36	
    37	  -- Tjek om tabellen har klassificering.
    38	  select exists (
    39	    select 1 from core_compliance.data_field_definitions
    40	    where table_schema = p_schema and table_name = p_table
    41	  ) into v_has_defs;
    42	
    43	  if not v_has_defs then
    44	    if v_strict then
    45	      raise exception 'audit_filter_values: ingen klassificering for %.%', p_schema, p_table
    46	        using errcode = 'P0001';
    47	    else
    48	      raise warning 'audit_filter_values: ingen klassificering for %.% — værdier bevaret uændret', p_schema, p_table;
    49	      return p_values;
    50	    end if;
    51	  end if;
    52	
    53	  -- Walker top-level kolonner og hashes direct-PII (uændret T1-logik).
    54	  for v_def in
    55	    select column_name, pii_level
    56	    from core_compliance.data_field_definitions
    57	    where table_schema = p_schema and table_name = p_table
    58	  loop
    59	    if p_values ? v_def.column_name then
    60	      if v_def.pii_level = 'direct' then
    61	        -- BUG-FIX (V12 post-build): skip NULL-værdier. jsonb_set med NULL-value
    62	        -- returnerer hele jsonb som NULL → silent audit-data-tab. Matcher pattern
    63	        -- fra clients-special-case nedenfor (jsonb_typeof distinct from 'null').
    64	        if jsonb_typeof(p_values -> v_def.column_name) is distinct from 'null' then
    65	          v_result := jsonb_set(
    66	            v_result,
    67	            array[v_def.column_name],
    68	            to_jsonb(
    69	              'sha256:' ||
    70	              encode(extensions.digest((p_values->>v_def.column_name)::text, 'sha256'), 'hex')
    71	            )
    72	          );
    73	        end if;
    74	      end if;
    75	    end if;
    76	  end loop;
    77	
    78	  -- Trin 10 clients-special-case: walker clients.fields jsonb og hashes direct-PII keys
    79	  -- pr. client_field_definitions. V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): hashes
    80	  -- ALLE direct-PII definitioner, uafhængigt af is_active — ellers ville deaktivering
    81	  -- af et felt skabe datalæk for værdier der allerede ligger i eksisterende fields.
    82	  -- T10.1's clients_fields_is_object-CHECK garanterer at fields er object her,
    83	  -- men defensiv jsonb_typeof-tjek bevares.
    84	  if p_schema = 'core_identity'
    85	     and p_table = 'clients'
    86	     and v_result ? 'fields'
    87	     and jsonb_typeof(v_result -> 'fields') = 'object' then
    88	    v_fields := v_result -> 'fields';
    89	    for v_field_key in
    90	      select key from core_identity.client_field_definitions
    91	      where pii_level = 'direct'
    92	    loop
    93	      if v_fields ? v_field_key then
    94	        v_field_value := v_fields -> v_field_key;
    95	        if jsonb_typeof(v_field_value) is distinct from 'null' then
    96	          v_fields := jsonb_set(
    97	            v_fields,
    98	            array[v_field_key],
    99	            to_jsonb('sha256:' || encode(extensions.digest(v_field_value::text, 'sha256'), 'hex'))
   100	          );
   101	        end if;
   102	      end if;
   103	    end loop;
   104	    v_result := jsonb_set(v_result, array['fields'], v_fields);
   105	  end if;
   106	
   107	  -- Tjek for ukendte kolonner (uændret T1-logik).
   108	  for v_key in select jsonb_object_keys(p_values) loop
   109	    if not exists (
   110	      select 1 from core_compliance.data_field_definitions d
   111	      where d.table_schema = p_schema
   112	        and d.table_name = p_table
   113	        and d.column_name = v_key
   114	    ) then
   115	      if v_strict then
   116	        raise exception 'audit_filter_values: ukendt kolonne %.%.% i input', p_schema, p_table, v_key
   117	          using errcode = 'P0001';
   118	      else
   119	        raise warning 'audit_filter_values: ukendt kolonne %.%.% — værdi bevaret uændret', p_schema, p_table, v_key;
   120	      end if;
   121	    end if;
   122	  end loop;
   123	
   124	  return v_result;
   125	end;
   126	$$;
   127	
   128	comment on function core_compliance.audit_filter_values(text, text, jsonb) is
   129	  'T10.5 (V2 Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): T1-logik + core_identity.clients-special-case (jsonb-walking af fields for direct-PII keys pr. client_field_definitions; INGEN is_active-filter for at undgå datalæk ved felt-deaktivering). LENIENT-default; strict via stork.audit_filter_strict.';

docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:17:| 1   | KRITISK/FUNKTIONELT | T10.7b `client_node_close` | Wrapper mangler klient-eksistens-check. Bryder krav-dok §3.4 "valideres at klienten faktisk findes" ved BÅDE oprettelse OG ændring. Close er en ændring. Uden check: pending oprettes på ikke-eksisterende client_id → `_apply_client_close` UPDATE'er 0 rows → silent no-op. `client_node_place` har check siden V7; `client_node_close` blev tilføjet i V9 uden check. | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `if not exists (select 1 from core_identity.clients where id = p_client_id) then raise P0002` i `client_node_close` wrapper FØR session-var + pending_change_request. Konsistent med client_node_place's mønster. | T10.7b + T10.15 |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:27:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:43:| 1   | KRITISK           | Fundament-tjek               | Tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:52:Codex runde 9 fandt 1 TEKNISK-BLOKERING: `_apply_client_place` bruger `is_admin()` til superadmin-bypass, men `auth.uid()` er NULL i cron-apply-context. Superadmin's pending kan fejle ved cron-apply hvis klient deaktiveres mellem pending og apply.
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:68:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING         | T10.7b + client_node_close | `client_node_place` kalder `pending_change_request` som INSERT'er i `core_identity.pending_changes`. Tabellen har INSERT-policy (T9-fundament-supplement `20260518100000:49-51`) der kræver `current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true'`. T10.7b's CREATE OR REPLACE sætter ikke session-var → INSERT vil fejle for authenticated-bruger med FORCE RLS. Samme latente T9-bug findes i `client_node_close` (uændret af V8) og de øvrige 5 T9-pending-wrappers (org*node_upsert, etc.) — men trin 10's scope er kun client-RPC'erne. **Code walk-through missede dette** fordi T9-tests bruger `\_apply*\*`-handlers direkte, aldrig fuld wrapper-vej. | **ACCEPT.** T10.7b udvides: `client_node_place` sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` efter aktiv-check, før `pending_change_request`. Plus ny CREATE OR REPLACE af `client_node_close` med samme session-var (uden aktiv-check — `client_node_close` skal kunne lukke placement på inaktiv klient). Default-privileges på `core_identity` schema (`grant execute on functions to authenticated`, T1) dækker GRANT-kravet — explicit GRANT er ikke nødvendigt. | T10.7b udvidet |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:71:**T9-public-wrapper-bug (Code-observation):** Codex' fund afslører at T9's 7 public-wrappers (`org_node_upsert`, `org_node_deactivate`, `team_close`, `employee_place`, `employee_remove_from_node`, `client_node_place`, `client_node_close`) alle mangler `t9_write_authorized`-session-var. Trin 10's scope er kun de to client-RPC'er; de øvrige 5 er T9-arbejde der skal adresseres som G-nummer/separat pakke (T9 ville fungere i tests fordi `_apply_*`-handlers er SECURITY DEFINER og kan kaldes direkte, men authenticated-bruger via wrapper-vej er broken).
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:106:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.7 (FK)         | FK sikrer KUN eksistens, ikke at klient er aktiv. Krav-dok §2.5.2: "Inaktiv klient bliver stående for historik, men kan ikke vælges som ny team-tilknytning." T9-wrapper `client_node_place` (`20260518000007:140-170`) validerer permission + team-only, men ikke aktiv klient. T9-supplement `_apply_client_place` (`20260520000000:285-352`) validerer team-only + team-aktiv, men ikke klient-aktiv. Krav-dok §3.4 siger "valideres at klienten faktisk findes" — sammen med §2.5.2 betyder det: findes + aktiv. Plus: pending kan oprettes mens klient aktiv og applies efter deaktivering → apply-pathen SKAL også tjekke. | **ACCEPT.** Ny step T10.7b: CREATE OR REPLACE begge RPC'er med aktiv-check **og superadmin-bypass** (Mathias 2026-05-21: "superadmin må alt"). Wrapper-rækkefølge: has_permission → team-check → klient-eksistens (P0002) → klient-aktiv (22023 hvis ikke superadmin). Apply-handler: tilføj klient-eksistens (P0002) + klient-aktiv (P0001 hvis ikke superadmin) FØR INSERT/UPDATE. `client_node_close` rør IKKE. | T10.7b (ny) + T10.15          |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:126:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:128:| 6   | KRITISK             | T10.15 `t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`      | Smoke-test INSERT'er i `core_identity.client_node_placements` som er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` (`:901-924`) kræver `begin;` + `rollback;` på linje-niveau.                                                                                                | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Eksplicit `begin;` + `rollback;` wrap-pattern i T10.15's FK-test specifikation. T10.7a's fixture-INSERT i T9-tests sker indenfor eksisterende BEGIN/ROLLBACK (verificeret: `t9_placements.sql:9` + `:213`, `t9_backdated_historical_traversal.sql:9` + `:311`).                                                                                                                            |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:199:| `core_compliance.stork_audit()` trigger-funktion                                                       | Refereret af alle T9-tabeller (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:55` etc.)                         | Generel audit-trigger der bruges `AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE` på alle write-tabeller. ROLLBACK ved test-slut isolerer ændringen. Uden dette rammer apply-vej `not_yet_due` før aktiv-check. **Tests:** T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie): non-admin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → non-admin approver → deaktiver klient → apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T4a (V14):** `client_node_close` på ikke-eksisterende client_id → forvent **P0002 `client_not_found`** (eksistens-check tilføjet i V14). **T5 superadmin-bypass wrapper (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success. **T6 (V10 cron-context):** superadmin opretter pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → simulér cron-apply (kør apply uden auth-context via `reset role` + direct `_apply_client_place`-call eller `pending_change_apply` som service_role) → success (bypass via `is_admin_by_employee_id(requested_by)`). **T7 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → superadmin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → success (bypass via approved_by). **T8 (V10):** non-admin opretter pending → non-admin approver → klient deaktiveres → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin involveret). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped. |

#!/usr/bin/env node
// DB-level test runner. Itererer supabase/tests/**/*.sql, sender hver til
// Supabase Management API som én query, fail-fast ved første test-fejl.
//
// Konvention: hver test er en SQL-fil med DO-block der RAISE EXCEPTION ved
// assertion-failure. Filer med side-effekter (employees/audit) bruger
// BEGIN/ROLLBACK så prod-DB ikke forurenes.

import { readdir, readFile, stat } from "node:fs/promises";
import { join, relative } from "node:path";

const ROOT = process.cwd();
const TESTS_DIR = "supabase/tests";
const TOKEN = process.env.SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const PROJECT_REF = process.env.SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF || "imtxvrymaqbgcvsarlib";

function parseArgs() {
  const args = process.argv.slice(2);
  const dirArg = args.indexOf("--dir");
  return {
    dir: dirArg >= 0 ? args[dirArg + 1] : null,
  };
}

async function walk(dir) {
  const out = [];
  async function recurse(d) {
    const entries = await readdir(d, { withFileTypes: true });
    for (const e of entries.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name))) {
      const p = join(d, e.name);
      if (e.isDirectory()) await recurse(p);
      else if (e.name.endsWith(".sql")) out.push(p);
    }
  }
  await recurse(dir);
  return out;
}

async function runQuery(query) {
  const res = await fetch(`https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/${PROJECT_REF}/database/query`, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({ query }),
  });
  if (!res.ok) {
    const body = await res.text();
    return { ok: false, status: res.status, body };
  }
  const body = await res.json();
  return { ok: true, body };
}

async function main() {
  if (!TOKEN) {
    console.error("SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN env-var er påkrævet for test:db");
    process.exit(2);
  }

  const { dir } = parseArgs();
  const targetDir = dir ? join(TESTS_DIR, dir) : TESTS_DIR;

  try {
    await stat(targetDir);
  } catch {
    console.error(`Test-mappe findes ikke: ${targetDir}`);
    process.exit(2);
  }

  const files = await walk(targetDir);
  if (files.length === 0) {
    console.log(`Ingen test-filer fundet i ${targetDir}`);
    return;
  }

  console.log(`Kører ${files.length} DB-test(s) mod project ${PROJECT_REF}`);
  console.log("");

  let passed = 0;
  let failed = 0;

  for (const file of files) {
    const rel = relative(ROOT, file);
    const sql = await readFile(file, "utf8");
    const start = Date.now();
    const result = await runQuery(sql);
    const elapsed = Date.now() - start;

    if (result.ok) {
      console.log(`✓ ${rel} (${elapsed} ms)`);
      passed++;
    } else {
      console.log(`✗ ${rel} (${elapsed} ms)`);
      console.log(`  status: ${result.status || "n/a"}`);
      let errMsg;
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(result.body);
        errMsg = parsed.message || result.body;
      } catch {
        errMsg = result.body;
      }
      console.log(`  error: ${errMsg.split("\n").slice(0, 5).join("\n         ")}`);
      console.log(`::error file=${rel}::DB-test fejlet: ${errMsg.split("\n")[0]}`);
      failed++;
      // Fail-fast for kortest CI-feedback
      break;
    }
  }

  console.log("");
  console.log(`DB-tests: ${passed} passed, ${failed} failed`);
  if (failed > 0) {
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

main().catch((err) => {
  console.error("Test-runner fatal:", err);
  process.exit(2);
});

PLAN-AFVIGELSE (KRITISK): `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` simulerer stadig ikke V14’s cron/no-auth apply-path.

Fund: T6/T7 kalder `pending_change_apply` mens `request.jwt.claim.sub` stadig står på admin-auth (`linje 223/292`), og der laves ingen `reset role`/nulstilling af JWT før apply. Dermed ville en regression tilbage til `is_admin()` i `_apply_client_place` kunne passere testen, selvom V10-fundet netop var cron-context med `auth.uid() = NULL`.

Sekundært under samme fund: T1/T4/T5 verifierer kun wrapper returnerer pending-id, ikke approve+apply/placement-close end-to-end. Niveau-1-prefix kræver eksempel-row gennem write-flow/apply-dispatch.

LØS: Før T6/T7 apply: nulstil auth-context eksplicit og kør apply som cron/service-role/no-auth, eller kald `_apply_client_place` direkte uden JWT som planen tillader. Udvid T1/T4/T5 til approve+apply hvor flowet påstås dækket.

PLAN-AFVIGELSE (KRITISK): `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` simulerer stadig ikke V14’s cron/no-auth apply-path.

Fund: T6/T7 kalder `pending_change_apply` mens `request.jwt.claim.sub` stadig står på admin-auth (`linje 223/292`), og der laves ingen `reset role`/nulstilling af JWT før apply. Dermed ville en regression tilbage til `is_admin()` i `_apply_client_place` kunne passere testen, selvom V10-fundet netop var cron-context med `auth.uid() = NULL`.

Sekundært under samme fund: T1/T4/T5 verifierer kun wrapper returnerer pending-id, ikke approve+apply/placement-close end-to-end. Niveau-1-prefix kræver eksempel-row gennem write-flow/apply-dispatch.

LØS: Før T6/T7 apply: nulstil auth-context eksplicit og kør apply som cron/service-role/no-auth, eller kald `_apply_client_place` direkte uden JWT som planen tillader. Udvid T1/T4/T5 til approve+apply hvor flowet påstås dækket.
